Entity to get cells for\n\t* @param outKeys - Array to store keys in (to avoid allocation)\n\t* @returns Number of keys added\n\t*/\n\tgetEntityKeys(entity, outKeys) {\n\t\tconst collider = createCollider(entity);\n\t\tif (!collider) return 0;\n\t\tconst bounds = collider.getBounds();\n\t\tconst minGrid = this.worldToGrid(bounds.minX, bounds.minY);\n\t\tconst maxGrid = this.worldToGrid(bounds.maxX, bounds.maxY);\n\t\tlet count = 0;\n\t\toutKeys.length = 0;\n\t\tfor (let x = minGrid.x; x <= maxGrid.x; x++) for (let y = minGrid.y; y <= maxGrid.y; y++) {\n\t\t\tconst wrappedX = (x % this.gridWidth + this.gridWidth) % this.gridWidth;\n\t\t\tconst wrappedY = (y % this.gridHeight + this.gridHeight) % this.gridHeight;\n\t\t\toutKeys.push(this.getKey(wrappedX, wrappedY));\n\t\t\tcount++;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn count;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Inserts an entity into the spatial hash\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to insert\n\t*/\n\tinsert(entity) {\n\t\tconst newKeys = [];\n\t\tthis.getEntityKeys(entity, newKeys);\n\t\tthis.entityCells.set(entity, newKeys);\n\t\tfor (const key of newKeys) this.getCell(key).add(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes an entity from the spatial hash\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to remove\n\t*/\n\tremove(entity) {\n\t\tconst keys = this.entityCells.get(entity);\n\t\tif (!keys) return;\n\t\tfor (const key of keys) {\n\t\t\tconst cell = this.cells.get(key);\n\t\t\tif (cell) cell.remove(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.entityCells.delete(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates an entity's position in the spatial hash\n\t* \n\t* Removes and re-inserts the entity if it moved to different cells.\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to update\n\t*/\n\tupdate(entity) {\n\t\tconst oldKeys = this.entityCells.get(entity);\n\t\tconst newKeys = [];\n\t\tthis.getEntityKeys(entity, newKeys);\n\t\tif (oldKeys && oldKeys.length === newKeys.length) {\n\t\t\tlet match = true;\n\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < oldKeys.length; i++) if (oldKeys[i] !== newKeys[i]) {\n\t\t\t\tmatch = false;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (match) return;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (oldKeys) for (const key of oldKeys) {\n\t\t\tconst cell = this.cells.get(key);\n\t\t\tif (cell) cell.remove(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.entityCells.set(entity, newKeys);\n\t\tfor (const key of newKeys) this.getCell(key).add(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Queries entities near a given entity\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - AABB to query\n\t* @returns Set of entities in the region\n\t*/\n\tqueryAABB(bounds) {\n\t\tconst minGrid = this.worldToGrid(bounds.minX, bounds.minY);\n\t\tconst maxGrid = this.worldToGrid(bounds.maxX, bounds.maxY);\n\t\tconst results = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tfor (let x = minGrid.x; x <= maxGrid.x; x++) for (let y = minGrid.y; y <= maxGrid.y; y++) {\n\t\t\tconst wrappedX = (x % this.gridWidth + this.gridWidth) % this.gridWidth;\n\t\t\tconst wrappedY = (y % this.gridHeight + this.gridHeight) % this.gridHeight;\n\t\t\tconst key = this.getKey(wrappedX, wrappedY);\n\t\t\tconst cell = this.cells.get(key);\n\t\t\tif (cell) for (const entity of cell.entities) results.add(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn results;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clears all entities from the spatial hash\n\t*/\n\tclear() {\n\t\tthis.cells.clear();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets statistics about the spatial hash\n\t* \n\t* @returns Statistics object\n\t*/\n\tgetStats() {\n\t\tlet totalEntities = 0;\n\t\tfor (const cell of this.cells.values()) totalEntities += cell.entities.length;\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\ttotalCells: this.gridWidth * this.gridHeight,\n\t\t\tusedCells: this.cells.size,\n\t\t\ttotalEntities,\n\t\t\taverageEntitiesPerCell: this.cells.size > 0 ? totalEntities / this.cells.size : 0\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Casts a ray against entities in the spatial hash\n\t* \n\t* @param ray - Ray to cast\n\t* @param mask - Optional collision mask (layer)\n\t* @param filter - Optional filter function (return true to include entity)\n\t* @returns Raycast hit info if hit, null otherwise\n\t*/\n\traycast(ray, mask, filter) {\n\t\tconst start = ray.origin;\n\t\tconst end = ray.getPoint(Math.min(ray.length, 1e4));\n\t\tlet x0 = start.x;\n\t\tlet y0 = start.y;\n\t\tconst x1 = end.x;\n\t\tconst y1 = end.y;\n\t\tlet gx0 = Math.floor(x0 / this.cellSize);\n\t\tlet gy0 = Math.floor(y0 / this.cellSize);\n\t\tconst gx1 = Math.floor(x1 / this.cellSize);\n\t\tconst gy1 = Math.floor(y1 / this.cellSize);\n\t\tconst sx = x0 < x1 ? 1 : -1;\n\t\tconst sy = y0 < y1 ? 1 : -1;\n\t\tconst visitedEntities = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tlet closestHit = null;\n\t\tconst checkCell = (gx, gy) => {\n\t\t\tconst wrappedX = (gx % this.gridWidth + this.gridWidth) % this.gridWidth;\n\t\t\tconst wrappedY = (gy % this.gridHeight + this.gridHeight) % this.gridHeight;\n\t\t\tconst key = this.getKey(wrappedX, wrappedY);\n\t\t\tconst cell = this.cells.get(key);\n\t\t\tif (cell) for (const entity of cell.entities) {\n\t\t\t\tif (visitedEntities.has(entity)) continue;\n\t\t\t\tvisitedEntities.add(entity);\n\t\t\t\tif (mask !== void 0 && (entity.collisionCategory & mask) === 0) continue;\n\t\t\t\tif (filter && !filter(entity)) continue;\n\t\t\t\tconst collider = createCollider(entity);\n\t\t\t\tif (collider) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst hit = collider.raycast(ray);\n\t\t\t\t\tif (hit) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!closestHit || hit.distance < closestHit.distance) closestHit = hit;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t};\n\t\tlet x = gx0;\n\t\tlet y = gy0;\n\t\tconst stepX = sx;\n\t\tconst stepY = sy;\n\t\tconst tDeltaX = this.cellSize / Math.abs(ray.direction.x);\n\t\tconst tDeltaY = this.cellSize / Math.abs(ray.direction.y);\n\t\tlet tMaxX = ray.direction.x > 0 ? ((x + 1) * this.cellSize - start.x) / ray.direction.x : (start.x - x * this.cellSize) / -ray.direction.x;\n\t\tif (ray.direction.x < 0) tMaxX = (start.x - x * this.cellSize) / -ray.direction.x;\n\t\telse tMaxX = ((x + 1) * this.cellSize - start.x) / ray.direction.x;\n\t\tlet tMaxY = ray.direction.y > 0 ? ((y + 1) * this.cellSize - start.y) / ray.direction.y : (start.y - y * this.cellSize) / -ray.direction.y;\n\t\tif (ray.direction.y < 0) tMaxY = (start.y - y * this.cellSize) / -ray.direction.y;\n\t\telse tMaxY = ((y + 1) * this.cellSize - start.y) / ray.direction.y;\n\t\tif (Math.abs(ray.direction.x) < 1e-9) tMaxX = Infinity;\n\t\tif (Math.abs(ray.direction.y) < 1e-9) tMaxY = Infinity;\n\t\tlet steps = 0;\n\t\tconst maxSteps = Math.abs(gx1 - gx0) + Math.abs(gy1 - gy0) + 10;\n\t\twhile (steps < maxSteps) {\n\t\t\tcheckCell(x, y);\n\t\t\tif (closestHit) {\n\t\t\t\tif (closestHit.distance < Math.min(tMaxX, tMaxY)) return closestHit;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (tMaxX < tMaxY) {\n\t\t\t\ttMaxX += tDeltaX;\n\t\t\t\tx += stepX;\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\ttMaxY += tDeltaY;\n\t\t\t\ty += stepY;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsteps++;\n\t\t\tif (closestHit && closestHit.distance < ray.length) {}\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn closestHit;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/collision/Ray.ts\n/**\n* Ray for raycasting\n*/\nvar Ray = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new ray\n\t* \n\t* @param origin - Ray origin\n\t* @param direction - Ray direction\n\t* @param length - Maximum length (default: Infinity)\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(origin, direction, length = Infinity) {\n\t\tthis.origin = origin.clone();\n\t\tthis.direction = direction.clone().normalizeInPlace();\n\t\tthis.length = length;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets a point along the ray\n\t* \n\t* @param distance - Distance from origin\n\t* @returns Point at distance\n\t*/\n\tgetPoint(distance) {\n\t\treturn this.origin.add(this.direction.mul(distance));\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/collision/raycast.ts\n/**\n* Casts a ray in the world using the spatial partition for broad-phase, then shape-specific narrow-phase.\n* Direction will be normalized internally.\n*\n* @param partition - Spatial partition to query\n* @param origin - Ray origin\n* @param direction - Ray direction (any length)\n* @param maxDistance - Maximum distance\n* @param mask - Optional collision mask (layer)\n* @param filter - Optional filter function (return true to include entity)\n* @returns Nearest hit or null\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const hit = raycast(worldPartition, new Vector2(0,0), new Vector2(1,0), 1000);\n* if (hit) {\n*   // handle\n* }\n* ```\n*/\nfunction raycast(partition, origin, direction, maxDistance, mask, filter) {\n\tconst dir = direction.length() > 0 ? direction.normalize() : new Vector2(1, 0);\n\tconst end = origin.add(dir.mul(maxDistance));\n\tconst candidates = partition.raycast(new Ray(origin, dir, maxDistance), mask, filter);\n\tif (candidates) return candidates;\n\tconst bounds = new AABB(Math.min(origin.x, end.x), Math.min(origin.y, end.y), Math.max(origin.x, end.x), Math.max(origin.y, end.y));\n\tconst entities = partition.queryAABB(bounds);\n\tlet best = null;\n\tfor (const e of entities) {\n\t\tif (mask !== void 0 && (e.collisionCategory & mask) === 0) continue;\n\t\tif (filter && !filter(e)) continue;\n\t\tconst collider = createCollider(e);\n\t\tif (!collider) continue;\n\t\tconst hit = raycastCollider(collider, origin, dir, maxDistance);\n\t\tif (!hit) continue;\n\t\tif (!best || hit.distance < best.distance) best = hit;\n\t}\n\treturn best;\n}\nfunction raycastCollider(collider, origin, dir, maxDistance) {\n\tif (collider instanceof CircleCollider) return raycastCircle(collider, origin, dir, maxDistance);\n\tif (collider instanceof AABBCollider) return raycastAABB(collider, origin, dir, maxDistance);\n\tif (collider instanceof PolygonCollider) return raycastPolygon(collider, origin, dir, maxDistance);\n\treturn null;\n}\nfunction raycastCircle(circle, origin, dir, maxDistance) {\n\tconst c = circle.getCenter();\n\tconst r = circle.getRadius();\n\tconst m = origin.sub(c);\n\tconst b = m.dot(dir);\n\tconst cval = m.dot(m) - r * r;\n\tif (cval > 0 && b > 0) return null;\n\tconst discr = b * b - cval;\n\tif (discr < 0) return null;\n\tconst t = -b - Math.sqrt(discr);\n\tif (t < 0) return null;\n\tif (t > maxDistance) return null;\n\tconst point = origin.add(dir.mul(t));\n\tconst normal = point.sub(c).normalize();\n\treturn {\n\t\tentity: circle.getEntity(),\n\t\tpoint,\n\t\tnormal,\n\t\tdistance: t\n\t};\n}\nfunction raycastAABB(box, origin, dir, maxDistance) {\n\tconst b = box.getBounds();\n\tlet tmin = 0;\n\tlet tmax = maxDistance;\n\tconst invDx = 1 / (dir.x === 0 ? 1e-9 : dir.x);\n\tconst invDy = 1 / (dir.y === 0 ? 1e-9 : dir.y);\n\tlet tx1 = (b.minX - origin.x) * invDx;\n\tlet tx2 = (b.maxX - origin.x) * invDx;\n\tlet ty1 = (b.minY - origin.y) * invDy;\n\tlet ty2 = (b.maxY - origin.y) * invDy;\n\tconst tminX = Math.min(tx1, tx2);\n\tconst tmaxX = Math.max(tx1, tx2);\n\tconst tminY = Math.min(ty1, ty2);\n\tconst tmaxY = Math.max(ty1, ty2);\n\ttmin = Math.max(tmin, Math.max(tminX, tminY));\n\ttmax = Math.min(tmax, Math.min(tmaxX, tmaxY));\n\tif (tmax < tmin || tmin < 0 || tmin > maxDistance) return null;\n\tconst point = origin.add(dir.mul(tmin));\n\tlet normal;\n\tif (tmin === tminX) normal = new Vector2(dir.x > 0 ? -1 : 1, 0);\n\telse normal = new Vector2(0, dir.y > 0 ? -1 : 1);\n\treturn {\n\t\tentity: box.getEntity(),\n\t\tpoint,\n\t\tnormal,\n\t\tdistance: tmin\n\t};\n}\nfunction raycastPolygon(poly, origin, dir, maxDistance) {\n\tconst end = origin.add(dir.mul(maxDistance));\n\tlet bestT = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\n\tlet bestPoint = null;\n\tlet bestNormal = null;\n\tconst any = poly;\n\tconst parts = any[\"getWorldParts\"] ? any[\"getWorldParts\"]() : [];\n\tfor (const part of parts) for (let i = 0; i < part.length; i++) {\n\t\tconst a = part[i];\n\t\tconst b = part[(i + 1) % part.length];\n\t\tif (!a || !b) continue;\n\t\tconst hit = segmentRayIntersection(a, b, origin, end);\n\t\tif (!hit) continue;\n\t\tconst t = hit.distance;\n\t\tif (t >= 0 && t <= maxDistance && t < bestT) {\n\t\t\tbestT = t;\n\t\t\tbestPoint = hit.point;\n\t\t\tconst edge = b.sub(a);\n\t\t\tbestNormal = new Vector2(-edge.y, edge.x).normalize();\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif (!bestPoint || !bestNormal || bestT === Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY) return null;\n\treturn {\n\t\tentity: poly.getEntity(),\n\t\tpoint: bestPoint,\n\t\tnormal: bestNormal,\n\t\tdistance: bestT\n\t};\n}\nfunction segmentRayIntersection(a, b, r0, r1) {\n\tconst v1 = r0.sub(a);\n\tconst v2 = b.sub(a);\n\tconst v3 = new Vector2(-(r1.y - r0.y), r1.x - r0.x);\n\tconst denom = v2.dot(v3);\n\tif (Math.abs(denom) < 1e-9) return null;\n\tconst t1 = v2.cross(v1) / denom;\n\tconst t2 = v1.dot(v3) / denom;\n\tif (t1 >= 0 && t1 <= 1 && t2 >= 0 && t2 <= 1) {\n\t\tconst hitPoint = new Vector2(r0.x + (r1.x - r0.x) * t1, r0.y + (r1.y - r0.y) * t1);\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\tpoint: hitPoint,\n\t\t\tdistance: hitPoint.sub(r0).length()\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\treturn null;\n}\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/collision/resolver.ts\n/**\n* Collision resolver\n* \n* Resolves collisions by separating entities and applying impulses.\n* Uses impulse-based resolution for stable, deterministic physics.\n* \n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const resolver = new CollisionResolver();\n* resolver.resolve(collision);\n* ```\n*/\nvar CollisionResolver = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new collision resolver\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Resolver configuration\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(config = {}) {\n\t\tthis.config = {\n\t\t\tpositionCorrectionFactor: config.positionCorrectionFactor ?? .8,\n\t\t\tminPenetrationDepth: config.minPenetrationDepth ?? 1e-4,\n\t\t\tmaxPositionCorrection: config.maxPositionCorrection ?? 5\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Resolves a collision\n\t* \n\t* Separates entities and applies collision response.\n\t* First checks if the collision should be resolved using resolution filters.\n\t* If any entity has a resolution filter that returns false, the collision\n\t* is skipped (entities pass through) but events are still fired.\n\t* \n\t* @param collision - Collision information to resolve\n\t*/\n\tresolve(collision) {\n\t\tconst { entityA, entityB, normal, depth } = collision;\n\t\tif (depth < this.config.minPenetrationDepth) return;\n\t\tif (!entityA.shouldResolveCollisionWith(entityB)) return;\n\t\tthis.separateEntities(entityA, entityB, normal, depth);\n\t\tthis.resolveVelocities(entityA, entityB, normal);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Separates two entities by moving them apart\n\t* \n\t* This method applies position corrections to resolve penetration between\n\t* colliding entities. After applying corrections, it notifies position change\n\t* handlers to ensure proper synchronization with game logic (e.g., updating\n\t* owner.x/y signals for network sync).\n\t* \n\t* @param entityA - First entity\n\t* @param entityB - Second entity\n\t* @param normal - Separation normal (from A to B)\n\t* @param depth - Penetration depth\n\t*/\n\tseparateEntities(entityA, entityB, normal, depth) {\n\t\tconst totalInvMass = entityA.invMass + entityB.invMass;\n\t\tif (totalInvMass === 0) return;\n\t\tconst correction = Math.min(depth * this.config.positionCorrectionFactor, this.config.maxPositionCorrection);\n\t\tconst correctionA = normal.mul(-correction * (entityA.invMass / totalInvMass));\n\t\tconst correctionB = normal.mul(correction * (entityB.invMass / totalInvMass));\n\t\tif (!entityA.isStatic()) {\n\t\t\tentityA.position.addInPlace(correctionA);\n\t\t\tentityA.notifyPositionChange();\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (!entityB.isStatic()) {\n\t\t\tentityB.position.addInPlace(correctionB);\n\t\t\tentityB.notifyPositionChange();\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Resolves velocities using impulse-based collision response\n\t* \n\t* @param entityA - First entity\n\t* @param entityB - Second entity\n\t* @param normal - Collision normal (from A to B)\n\t*/\n\tresolveVelocities(entityA, entityB, normal) {\n\t\tconst relativeVelocity = entityB.velocity.sub(entityA.velocity);\n\t\tconst velocityAlongNormal = relativeVelocity.dot(normal);\n\t\tif (velocityAlongNormal > 0) return;\n\t\tconst restitution = Math.min(entityA.restitution, entityB.restitution);\n\t\tconst totalInvMass = entityA.invMass + entityB.invMass;\n\t\tif (totalInvMass === 0) return;\n\t\tconst impulseScalar = -(1 + restitution) * velocityAlongNormal / totalInvMass;\n\t\tconst impulse = normal.mul(impulseScalar);\n\t\tif (!entityA.isStatic()) {\n\t\t\tentityA.velocity.addInPlace(impulse.mul(-entityA.invMass));\n\t\t\tentityA.notifyMovementChange();\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (!entityB.isStatic()) {\n\t\t\tentityB.velocity.addInPlace(impulse.mul(entityB.invMass));\n\t\t\tentityB.notifyMovementChange();\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst tangent = relativeVelocity.sub(normal.mul(velocityAlongNormal));\n\t\tconst tangentLength = tangent.length();\n\t\tif (tangentLength > 1e-5) {\n\t\t\tconst friction = Math.sqrt(entityA.friction * entityB.friction);\n\t\t\tconst frictionImpulse = tangent.normalize().mul(-tangentLength * friction / totalInvMass);\n\t\t\tconst maxFriction = Math.abs(impulseScalar * friction);\n\t\t\tif (frictionImpulse.length() > maxFriction) frictionImpulse.normalizeInPlace().mulInPlace(maxFriction);\n\t\t\tif (!entityA.isStatic()) {\n\t\t\t\tentityA.velocity.addInPlace(frictionImpulse.mul(-entityA.invMass));\n\t\t\t\tentityA.notifyMovementChange();\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (!entityB.isStatic()) {\n\t\t\t\tentityB.velocity.addInPlace(frictionImpulse.mul(entityB.invMass));\n\t\t\t\tentityB.notifyMovementChange();\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Resolves multiple collisions\n\t* \n\t* @param collisions - Array of collisions to resolve\n\t*/\n\tresolveAll(collisions) {\n\t\tfor (const collision of collisions) this.resolve(collision);\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/collision/sweep.ts\n/**\n* Computes time-of-impact for a pair of entities using simple analytical sweeps.\n* Supports Circle-Circle, Circle-AABB, AABB-AABB. Polygon falls back to AABB sweep.\n*\n* @param a - First entity\n* @param b - Second entity\n* @param delta - World displacement of entity A over the step (A's motion, B assumed static). For relative motion, pass (vA - vB) * dt.\n* @returns SweepResult or null if no hit in [0,1]\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const rel = entityA.velocity.sub(entityB.velocity).mul(dt);\n* const hit = sweepEntities(entityA, entityB, rel);\n* ```\n*/\nfunction sweepEntities(a, b, delta) {\n\tconst ca = createCollider(a);\n\tconst cb = createCollider(b);\n\tif (!ca || !cb) return null;\n\treturn sweepColliders(ca, cb, delta);\n}\nfunction sweepColliders(a, b, delta) {\n\tif (a instanceof CircleCollider && b instanceof CircleCollider) return sweepCircleCircle(a, b, delta);\n\tif (a instanceof CircleCollider && b instanceof AABBCollider) return sweepCircleAABB(a, b, delta);\n\tif (a instanceof AABBCollider && b instanceof CircleCollider) {\n\t\tconst res = sweepCircleAABB(b, a, delta.mul(-1));\n\t\tif (!res) return null;\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\ttime: res.time,\n\t\t\tnormal: res.normal.mul(-1),\n\t\t\tpoint: res.point\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\tif (a instanceof AABBCollider && b instanceof AABBCollider) return sweepAABBAABB(a, b, delta);\n\tif (a instanceof PolygonCollider || b instanceof PolygonCollider) {\n\t\tconst aa = a.getBounds();\n\t\tconst bb = b.getBounds();\n\t\tconst ca = new AABBCollider(a.getEntity());\n\t\tconst cb = new AABBCollider(b.getEntity());\n\t\tca.getBounds = () => aa;\n\t\tcb.getBounds = () => bb;\n\t\treturn sweepAABBAABB(ca, cb, delta);\n\t}\n\treturn null;\n}\nfunction sweepCircleCircle(a, b, delta) {\n\tconst p0 = a.getCenter();\n\tconst c = b.getCenter();\n\tconst r = a.getRadius() + b.getRadius();\n\tconst m = p0.sub(c);\n\tconst d = delta;\n\tconst A = d.dot(d);\n\tconst B = 2 * m.dot(d);\n\tconst C = m.dot(m) - r * r;\n\tconst disc = B * B - 4 * A * C;\n\tif (disc < 0 || A === 0) return null;\n\tconst t = (-B - Math.sqrt(disc)) / (2 * A);\n\tif (t < 0 || t > 1) return null;\n\tconst hitPoint = p0.add(d.mul(t));\n\tconst normal = hitPoint.sub(c).normalize();\n\treturn {\n\t\ttime: t,\n\t\tnormal,\n\t\tpoint: hitPoint.sub(normal.mul(a.getRadius()))\n\t};\n}\nfunction sweepCircleAABB(circle, box, delta) {\n\tconst r = circle.getRadius();\n\tconst b = box.getBounds();\n\tconst expanded = new AABB(b.minX - r, b.minY - r, b.maxX + r, b.maxY + r);\n\tconst p0 = circle.getCenter();\n\tconst dir = delta;\n\tconst res = rayVsAABB(new Vector2(0, 0), dir, new AABB(expanded.minX - p0.x, expanded.minY - p0.y, expanded.maxX - p0.x, expanded.maxY - p0.y), 1);\n\tif (!res) return null;\n\tconst t = res.t;\n\tconst hitPos = p0.add(dir.mul(t));\n\tconst normal = res.normal;\n\treturn {\n\t\ttime: t,\n\t\tnormal,\n\t\tpoint: hitPos.sub(normal.mul(r))\n\t};\n}\nfunction sweepAABBAABB(a, b, delta) {\n\tconst A = a.getBounds();\n\tconst B = b.getBounds();\n\tconst invDx = 1 / (delta.x === 0 ? 1e-9 : delta.x);\n\tconst invDy = 1 / (delta.y === 0 ? 1e-9 : delta.y);\n\tconst xEntry = (delta.x > 0 ? B.minX - A.maxX : B.maxX - A.minX) * invDx;\n\tconst xExit = (delta.x > 0 ? B.maxX - A.minX : B.minX - A.maxX) * invDx;\n\tconst yEntry = (delta.y > 0 ? B.minY - A.maxY : B.maxY - A.minY) * invDy;\n\tconst yExit = (delta.y > 0 ? B.maxY - A.minY : B.minY - A.maxY) * invDy;\n\tconst tEntry = Math.max(Math.min(xEntry, xExit), Math.min(yEntry, yExit));\n\tif (tEntry > Math.min(Math.max(xEntry, xExit), Math.max(yEntry, yExit)) || tEntry < 0 || tEntry > 1) return null;\n\tlet normal;\n\tif (Math.min(xEntry, xExit) > Math.min(yEntry, yExit)) normal = new Vector2(delta.x > 0 ? -1 : 1, 0);\n\telse normal = new Vector2(0, delta.y > 0 ? -1 : 1);\n\tconst hitPoint = new Vector2(delta.x !== 0 ? delta.x > 0 ? A.maxX : A.minX : (A.minX + A.maxX) * .5, delta.y !== 0 ? delta.y > 0 ? A.maxY : A.minY : (A.minY + A.maxY) * .5);\n\treturn {\n\t\ttime: tEntry,\n\t\tnormal,\n\t\tpoint: hitPoint\n\t};\n}\nfunction rayVsAABB(origin, dir, b, maxT) {\n\tconst invDx = 1 / (dir.x === 0 ? 1e-9 : dir.x);\n\tconst invDy = 1 / (dir.y === 0 ? 1e-9 : dir.y);\n\tlet tmin = 0;\n\tlet tmax = maxT;\n\tconst tx1 = (b.minX - origin.x) * invDx;\n\tconst tx2 = (b.maxX - origin.x) * invDx;\n\tconst ty1 = (b.minY - origin.y) * invDy;\n\tconst ty2 = (b.maxY - origin.y) * invDy;\n\tconst tminX = Math.min(tx1, tx2);\n\tconst tmaxX = Math.max(tx1, tx2);\n\tconst tminY = Math.min(ty1, ty2);\n\tconst tmaxY = Math.max(ty1, ty2);\n\ttmin = Math.max(tmin, Math.max(tminX, tminY));\n\ttmax = Math.min(tmax, Math.min(tmaxX, tmaxY));\n\tif (tmax < tmin || tmin < 0 || tmin > maxT) return null;\n\tconst normal = tmin === tminX ? new Vector2(dir.x > 0 ? -1 : 1, 0) : new Vector2(0, dir.y > 0 ? -1 : 1);\n\treturn {\n\t\tt: tmin,\n\t\tnormal\n\t};\n}\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/world/events.ts\n/**\n* Event system for physics world\n* \n* Manages event handlers for collisions, entity lifecycle, and other physics events.\n*/\nvar EventSystem = class {\n\tconstructor() {\n\t\tthis.collisionEnterHandlers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.collisionExitHandlers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.entityAddedHandlers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.entityRemovedHandlers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.entitySleepHandlers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.entityWakeHandlers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Registers a collision enter handler\n\t* \n\t* @param handler - Handler function\n\t* @returns Unsubscribe function\n\t*/\n\tonCollisionEnter(handler) {\n\t\tthis.collisionEnterHandlers.add(handler);\n\t\treturn () => this.collisionEnterHandlers.delete(handler);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Registers a collision exit handler\n\t* \n\t* @param handler - Handler function\n\t* @returns Unsubscribe function\n\t*/\n\tonCollisionExit(handler) {\n\t\tthis.collisionExitHandlers.add(handler);\n\t\treturn () => this.collisionExitHandlers.delete(handler);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Registers an entity added handler\n\t* \n\t* @param handler - Handler function\n\t* @returns Unsubscribe function\n\t*/\n\tonEntityAdded(handler) {\n\t\tthis.entityAddedHandlers.add(handler);\n\t\treturn () => this.entityAddedHandlers.delete(handler);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Registers an entity removed handler\n\t* \n\t* @param handler - Handler function\n\t* @returns Unsubscribe function\n\t*/\n\tonEntityRemoved(handler) {\n\t\tthis.entityRemovedHandlers.add(handler);\n\t\treturn () => this.entityRemovedHandlers.delete(handler);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Registers an entity sleep handler\n\t* \n\t* @param handler - Handler function\n\t* @returns Unsubscribe function\n\t*/\n\tonEntitySleep(handler) {\n\t\tthis.entitySleepHandlers.add(handler);\n\t\treturn () => this.entitySleepHandlers.delete(handler);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Registers an entity wake handler\n\t* \n\t* @param handler - Handler function\n\t* @returns Unsubscribe function\n\t*/\n\tonEntityWake(handler) {\n\t\tthis.entityWakeHandlers.add(handler);\n\t\treturn () => this.entityWakeHandlers.delete(handler);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Emits a collision enter event\n\t* \n\t* @param collision - Collision information\n\t*/\n\temitCollisionEnter(collision) {\n\t\tfor (const handler of this.collisionEnterHandlers) handler(collision);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Emits a collision exit event\n\t* \n\t* @param collision - Collision information\n\t*/\n\temitCollisionExit(collision) {\n\t\tfor (const handler of this.collisionExitHandlers) handler(collision);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Emits an entity added event\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity that was added\n\t*/\n\temitEntityAdded(entity) {\n\t\tfor (const handler of this.entityAddedHandlers) handler(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Emits an entity removed event\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity that was removed\n\t*/\n\temitEntityRemoved(entity) {\n\t\tfor (const handler of this.entityRemovedHandlers) handler(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Emits an entity sleep event\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity that went to sleep\n\t*/\n\temitEntitySleep(entity) {\n\t\tfor (const handler of this.entitySleepHandlers) handler(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Emits an entity wake event\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity that woke up\n\t*/\n\temitEntityWake(entity) {\n\t\tfor (const handler of this.entityWakeHandlers) handler(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clears all event handlers\n\t*/\n\tclear() {\n\t\tthis.collisionEnterHandlers.clear();\n\t\tthis.collisionExitHandlers.clear();\n\t\tthis.entityAddedHandlers.clear();\n\t\tthis.entityRemovedHandlers.clear();\n\t\tthis.entitySleepHandlers.clear();\n\t\tthis.entityWakeHandlers.clear();\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/world/World.ts\n/**\n* Physics world\n* \n* Manages entities, physics simulation, collisions, and events.\n* \n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const world = new World({ timeStep: 1/60 });\n* const entity = world.addEntity({ position: { x: 0, y: 0 }, radius: 10 });\n* world.step();\n* ```\n*/\nvar World = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new physics world\n\t* \n\t* @param config - World configuration\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(config = {}) {\n\t\tthis.entities = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.staticEntities = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.dynamicEntities = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.previousCollisions = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t\tthis.queryResults = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.timeStep = config.timeStep ?? 1 / 60;\n\t\tthis.enableSleep = config.enableSleep ?? true;\n\t\tthis.tileWidth = config.tileWidth ?? 32;\n\t\tthis.tileHeight = config.tileHeight ?? 32;\n\t\tthis.sleepThreshold = config.sleepThreshold ?? .5;\n\t\tthis.sleepVelocityThreshold = config.sleepVelocityThreshold ?? .01;\n\t\tthis.positionQuantizationStep = typeof config.positionQuantizationStep === \"number\" && config.positionQuantizationStep > 0 ? config.positionQuantizationStep : null;\n\t\tthis.velocityQuantizationStep = typeof config.velocityQuantizationStep === \"number\" && config.velocityQuantizationStep > 0 ? config.velocityQuantizationStep : null;\n\t\tconst integratorConfig = {\n\t\t\tdeltaTime: this.timeStep,\n\t\t\tmethod: config.integrationMethod ?? IntegrationMethod.Euler\n\t\t};\n\t\tif (config.gravity) integratorConfig.gravity = config.gravity;\n\t\tthis.integrator = new Integrator(integratorConfig);\n\t\tthis.resolverIterations = Math.max(1, Math.floor(config.resolverIterations ?? 3));\n\t\tconst resolverConfig = {};\n\t\tif (config.positionCorrectionFactor !== void 0) resolverConfig.positionCorrectionFactor = config.positionCorrectionFactor;\n\t\tif (config.maxPositionCorrection !== void 0) resolverConfig.maxPositionCorrection = config.maxPositionCorrection;\n\t\tif (config.minPenetrationDepth !== void 0) resolverConfig.minPenetrationDepth = config.minPenetrationDepth;\n\t\tthis.resolver = new CollisionResolver(resolverConfig);\n\t\tif (config.spatialPartition) this.spatialPartition = config.spatialPartition;\n\t\telse this.spatialPartition = new SpatialHash(config.spatialCellSize ?? 100, config.spatialGridWidth ?? 100, config.spatialGridHeight ?? 100);\n\t\tthis.events = new EventSystem();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the event system\n\t* \n\t* @returns Event system instance\n\t*/\n\tgetEvents() {\n\t\treturn this.events;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Returns the fixed simulation time step.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Time step in seconds\n\t*/\n\tgetTimeStep() {\n\t\treturn this.timeStep;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Adds an entity to the world\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to add\n\t* @returns The added entity\n\t*/\n\taddEntity(entity) {\n\t\tthis.entities.add(entity);\n\t\tif (entity.isStatic()) this.staticEntities.add(entity);\n\t\telse this.dynamicEntities.add(entity);\n\t\tthis.spatialPartition.insert(entity);\n\t\tthis.events.emitEntityAdded(entity);\n\t\treturn entity;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Performs a raycast against all entities in the world.\n\t* \n\t* @param origin - Starting point of the ray\n\t* @param direction - Direction of the ray (normalized)\n\t* @param length - Maximum length (default: Infinity)\n\t* @param mask - Optional collision mask (layer)\n\t* @param filter - Optional filter function (return true to include entity)\n\t* @returns Raycast hit info if hit, null otherwise\n\t*/\n\traycast(origin, direction, length = Infinity, mask, filter) {\n\t\tconst ray = new Ray(origin, direction, length);\n\t\treturn this.spatialPartition.raycast(ray, mask, filter);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Creates and adds a new entity\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Entity configuration\n\t* @returns Created entity\n\t*/\n\tcreateEntity(config) {\n\t\tconst entity = new Entity(config);\n\t\treturn this.addEntity(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes an entity from the world\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to remove\n\t*/\n\tremoveEntity(entity) {\n\t\tif (this.entities.delete(entity)) {\n\t\t\tthis.staticEntities.delete(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.dynamicEntities.delete(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.spatialPartition.remove(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.events.emitEntityRemoved(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all entities in the world\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of entities\n\t*/\n\tgetEntities() {\n\t\treturn Array.from(this.entities);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets an entity by UUID\n\t* \n\t* @param uuid - Entity UUID\n\t* @returns Entity or undefined\n\t*/\n\tgetEntityByUUID(uuid) {\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.entities) if (entity.uuid === uuid) return entity;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Steps the physics simulation forward\n\t* \n\t* Updates all entities, detects and resolves collisions.\n\t*/\n\tstep() {\n\t\tthis.refreshDynamicEntitiesInPartition();\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.dynamicEntities) if (!entity.isSleeping()) {\n\t\t\tconst startPos = entity.position.clone();\n\t\t\tthis.integrator.integrate(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.updateEntityTile(entity, startPos);\n\t\t\tif (entity.continuous) this.performCCD(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t\tlet firstPassCollisions = [];\n\t\tfor (let iteration = 0; iteration < this.resolverIterations; iteration++) {\n\t\t\tconst collisions = this.detectCollisions();\n\t\t\tif (iteration === 0) firstPassCollisions = collisions;\n\t\t\tif (collisions.length === 0) break;\n\t\t\tthis.sortCollisionsForDeterminism(collisions);\n\t\t\tthis.resolver.resolveAll(collisions);\n\t\t\tif (iteration + 1 < this.resolverIterations) this.refreshDynamicEntitiesInPartition();\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.positionQuantizationStep !== null || this.velocityQuantizationStep !== null) this.quantizeEntities();\n\t\tthis.handleCollisionEvents(firstPassCollisions);\n\t\tif (this.enableSleep) this.updateSleepState();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Detects collisions using spatial partition\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of collision infos\n\t*/\n\t/**\n\t* Detects collisions using spatial partition\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of collision infos\n\t*/\n\tdetectCollisions() {\n\t\tconst collisions = [];\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.dynamicEntities) {\n\t\t\tconst nearby = this.spatialPartition.query(entity, this.queryResults);\n\t\t\tfor (const other of nearby) {\n\t\t\t\tif (other.isDynamic() && entity.uuid > other.uuid) continue;\n\t\t\t\tconst collision = testCollision(entity, other);\n\t\t\t\tif (collision) collisions.push(collision);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn collisions;\n\t}\n\tsortCollisionsForDeterminism(collisions) {\n\t\tcollisions.sort((a, b) => {\n\t\t\tconst keyA = this.getCollisionKey(a);\n\t\t\tconst keyB = this.getCollisionKey(b);\n\t\t\treturn keyA.localeCompare(keyB);\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tgetCollisionKey(collision) {\n\t\tconst idA = collision.entityA.uuid;\n\t\tconst idB = collision.entityB.uuid;\n\t\treturn idA < idB ? `${idA}-${idB}` : `${idB}-${idA}`;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Handles collision enter/exit events\n\t* \n\t* @param collisions - Current frame collisions\n\t*/\n\thandleCollisionEvents(collisions) {\n\t\tconst currentCollisions = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t\tfor (const collision of collisions) {\n\t\t\tconst pairKey = collision.entityA.uuid < collision.entityB.uuid ? `${collision.entityA.uuid}-${collision.entityB.uuid}` : `${collision.entityB.uuid}-${collision.entityA.uuid}`;\n\t\t\tcurrentCollisions.set(pairKey, collision);\n\t\t\tif (!this.previousCollisions.has(pairKey)) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.events.emitCollisionEnter(collision);\n\t\t\t\tcollision.entityA.notifyCollisionEnter(collision, collision.entityB);\n\t\t\t\tcollision.entityB.notifyCollisionEnter(collision, collision.entityA);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor (const [pairKey, collision] of this.previousCollisions) if (!currentCollisions.has(pairKey)) {\n\t\t\tthis.events.emitCollisionExit(collision);\n\t\t\tcollision.entityA.notifyCollisionExit(collision, collision.entityB);\n\t\t\tcollision.entityB.notifyCollisionExit(collision, collision.entityA);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.previousCollisions = currentCollisions;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates sleep state for entities\n\t*/\n\tupdateSleepState() {\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.entities) {\n\t\t\tif (entity.isStatic() || entity.isSleeping()) continue;\n\t\t\tconst speed = entity.velocity.length();\n\t\t\tconst angularSpeed = Math.abs(entity.angularVelocity);\n\t\t\tif (speed < this.sleepVelocityThreshold && angularSpeed < this.sleepVelocityThreshold) {\n\t\t\t\tentity.timeSinceMovement += this.timeStep;\n\t\t\t\tif (entity.timeSinceMovement >= this.sleepThreshold) {\n\t\t\t\t\tentity.sleep();\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.events.emitEntitySleep(entity);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tentity.timeSinceMovement = 0;\n\t\t\t\tif (entity.isSleeping()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tentity.wakeUp();\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.events.emitEntityWake(entity);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clears all entities from the world\n\t*/\n\tclear() {\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.entities) this.events.emitEntityRemoved(entity);\n\t\tthis.entities.clear();\n\t\tthis.spatialPartition.clear();\n\t\tthis.previousCollisions.clear();\n\t}\n\tquantizeEntities() {\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.dynamicEntities) {\n\t\t\tif (this.positionQuantizationStep !== null) {\n\t\t\t\tentity.position.x = this.quantizeValue(entity.position.x, this.positionQuantizationStep);\n\t\t\t\tentity.position.y = this.quantizeValue(entity.position.y, this.positionQuantizationStep);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (this.velocityQuantizationStep !== null) {\n\t\t\t\tentity.velocity.x = this.quantizeValue(entity.velocity.x, this.velocityQuantizationStep);\n\t\t\t\tentity.velocity.y = this.quantizeValue(entity.velocity.y, this.velocityQuantizationStep);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tquantizeValue(value, step) {\n\t\treturn Math.round(value / step) * step;\n\t}\n\trefreshDynamicEntitiesInPartition() {\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.dynamicEntities) this.spatialPartition.update(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets statistics about the world\n\t* \n\t* @returns Statistics object\n\t*/\n\tgetStats() {\n\t\tlet dynamic = 0;\n\t\tlet static_ = 0;\n\t\tlet sleeping = 0;\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.entities) {\n\t\t\tif (entity.isStatic()) static_++;\n\t\t\telse dynamic++;\n\t\t\tif (entity.isSleeping()) sleeping++;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\ttotalEntities: this.entities.size,\n\t\t\tdynamicEntities: dynamic,\n\t\t\tstaticEntities: static_,\n\t\t\tsleepingEntities: sleeping\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Performs Continuous Collision Detection (CCD) for an entity\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to check\n\t*/\n\t/**\n\t* Updates entity tile position and triggers hooks\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to update\n\t* @param previousPosition - Position before integration\n\t*/\n\tupdateEntityTile(entity, previousPosition) {\n\t\tconst oldTileX = Math.floor(previousPosition.x / this.tileWidth);\n\t\tconst oldTileY = Math.floor(previousPosition.y / this.tileHeight);\n\t\tconst newTileX = Math.floor(entity.position.x / this.tileWidth);\n\t\tconst newTileY = Math.floor(entity.position.y / this.tileHeight);\n\t\tif (entity.currentTile.x === 0 && entity.currentTile.y === 0 && (oldTileX !== 0 || oldTileY !== 0)) entity.currentTile.set(oldTileX, oldTileY);\n\t\tif (newTileX !== oldTileX || newTileY !== oldTileY) {\n\t\t\tif (!entity.checkCanEnterTile(newTileX, newTileY)) {\n\t\t\t\tentity.position.copyFrom(previousPosition);\n\t\t\t\tentity.velocity.set(0, 0);\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tentity.notifyLeaveTile(oldTileX, oldTileY);\n\t\t\tentity.currentTile.set(newTileX, newTileY);\n\t\t\tentity.notifyEnterTile(newTileX, newTileY);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tperformCCD(entity) {\n\t\tconst dt = this.timeStep;\n\t\tconst delta = entity.velocity.mul(dt);\n\t\tif (delta.length() < entity.radius) return;\n\t\tconst collider = createCollider(entity);\n\t\tif (!collider) return;\n\t\tconst currentBounds = collider.getBounds();\n\t\tconst originalBounds = currentBounds.translate(-delta.x, -delta.y);\n\t\tconst sweptBounds = currentBounds.union(originalBounds);\n\t\tconst nearby = this.spatialPartition.queryAABB(sweptBounds);\n\t\tlet minTime = 1;\n\t\tlet collision = null;\n\t\tfor (const other of nearby) {\n\t\t\tif (other === entity || !other.isStatic()) continue;\n\t\t\tif (!entity.canCollideWith(other)) continue;\n\t\t\tconst originalPos = entity.position.clone();\n\t\t\tentity.position.subInPlace(delta);\n\t\t\tconst hit = sweepEntities(entity, other, delta);\n\t\t\tentity.position.copyFrom(originalPos);\n\t\t\tif (hit && hit.time < minTime) {\n\t\t\t\tminTime = hit.time;\n\t\t\t\tcollision = hit;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (collision && minTime < 1) {\n\t\t\tconst correction = collision.normal.mul(.001);\n\t\t\tentity.position.subInPlace(delta.mul(1 - minTime)).addInPlace(correction);\n\t\t\tconst vn = entity.velocity.dot(collision.normal);\n\t\t\tif (vn < 0) entity.velocity.subInPlace(collision.normal.mul(vn));\n\t\t}\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/region/Region.ts\n/**\n* Physical region in a distributed world\n* \n* Represents an independent simulation zone that can contain entities.\n* Regions can overlap to allow smooth entity transitions.\n* \n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const region = new Region({\n*   bounds: new AABB(0, 0, 100, 100),\n*   overlap: 10\n* });\n* ```\n*/\nvar Region = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new region\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Region configuration\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(config) {\n\t\tthis.entities = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\tthis.bounds = config.bounds.clone();\n\t\tthis.overlap = config.overlap ?? 0;\n\t\tthis.active = config.active ?? true;\n\t\tthis.world = new World({\n\t\t\tspatialCellSize: 50,\n\t\t\tspatialGridWidth: 50,\n\t\t\tspatialGridHeight: 50\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the region bounds\n\t* \n\t* @returns AABB bounds\n\t*/\n\tgetBounds() {\n\t\treturn this.bounds.clone();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the expanded bounds including overlap\n\t* \n\t* @returns Expanded AABB\n\t*/\n\tgetExpandedBounds() {\n\t\treturn this.bounds.expand(this.overlap);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if a point is inside this region\n\t* \n\t* @param point - Point to check\n\t* @returns True if point is inside\n\t*/\n\tcontains(point) {\n\t\treturn this.bounds.contains(point);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if an entity should belong to this region\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to check\n\t* @returns True if entity should be in this region\n\t*/\n\tshouldContain(entity) {\n\t\treturn this.bounds.contains(entity.position);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Adds an entity to this region\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to add\n\t*/\n\taddEntity(entity) {\n\t\tif (this.entities.has(entity)) return;\n\t\tthis.entities.add(entity);\n\t\tthis.world.addEntity(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes an entity from this region\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to remove\n\t*/\n\tremoveEntity(entity) {\n\t\tif (this.entities.delete(entity)) this.world.removeEntity(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all entities in this region\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of entities\n\t*/\n\tgetEntities() {\n\t\treturn Array.from(this.entities);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Steps the region's physics simulation\n\t*/\n\tstep() {\n\t\tif (!this.active) return;\n\t\tthis.world.step();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Activates this region\n\t*/\n\tactivate() {\n\t\tthis.active = true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Deactivates this region\n\t*/\n\tdeactivate() {\n\t\tthis.active = false;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if this region is active\n\t* \n\t* @returns True if active\n\t*/\n\tisActive() {\n\t\treturn this.active;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the world instance for this region\n\t* \n\t* @returns World instance\n\t*/\n\tgetWorld() {\n\t\treturn this.world;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if this region overlaps with another region\n\t* \n\t* @param other - Other region to check\n\t* @returns True if regions overlap\n\t*/\n\toverlaps(other) {\n\t\tconst expandedA = this.getExpandedBounds();\n\t\tconst expandedB = other.getExpandedBounds();\n\t\treturn expandedA.intersects(expandedB);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets entities that might need migration to neighboring regions\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of entities near region boundaries\n\t*/\n\tgetBoundaryEntities() {\n\t\tconst boundaryEntities = [];\n\t\tconst expandedBounds = this.getExpandedBounds();\n\t\tfor (const entity of this.entities) if (expandedBounds.contains(entity.position) && !this.bounds.contains(entity.position)) boundaryEntities.push(entity);\n\t\treturn boundaryEntities;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/region/RegionManager.ts\n/**\n* Region manager\n* \n* Manages multiple regions in a distributed physics world.\n* Handles entity migration between regions and region activation/deactivation.\n* \n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const manager = new RegionManager({\n*   worldBounds: new AABB(0, 0, 1000, 1000),\n*   regionSize: 200,\n*   overlap: 20\n* });\n* ```\n*/\nvar RegionManager = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new region manager\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Manager configuration\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(config) {\n\t\tthis.regions = [];\n\t\tthis.regionMap = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t\tthis.entityRegionMap = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t\tthis.config = {\n\t\t\tworldBounds: config.worldBounds,\n\t\t\tregionSize: config.regionSize,\n\t\t\toverlap: config.overlap ?? 0,\n\t\t\tautoActivate: config.autoActivate ?? true\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.createRegions();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Creates the grid of regions\n\t*/\n\tcreateRegions() {\n\t\tconst { worldBounds, regionSize, overlap } = this.config;\n\t\tconst worldWidth = worldBounds.getWidth();\n\t\tconst worldHeight = worldBounds.getHeight();\n\t\tconst cols = Math.ceil(worldWidth / regionSize);\n\t\tconst rows = Math.ceil(worldHeight / regionSize);\n\t\tfor (let row = 0; row < rows; row++) for (let col = 0; col < cols; col++) {\n\t\t\tconst minX = worldBounds.minX + col * regionSize;\n\t\t\tconst minY = worldBounds.minY + row * regionSize;\n\t\t\tconst region = new Region({\n\t\t\t\tbounds: new AABB(minX, minY, Math.min(minX + regionSize, worldBounds.maxX), Math.min(minY + regionSize, worldBounds.maxY)),\n\t\t\t\toverlap,\n\t\t\t\tactive: !this.config.autoActivate\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tconst key = this.getRegionKey(col, row);\n\t\t\tthis.regions.push(region);\n\t\t\tthis.regionMap.set(key, region);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets a region key from grid coordinates\n\t* \n\t* @param col - Column index\n\t* @param row - Row index\n\t* @returns Region key string\n\t*/\n\tgetRegionKey(col, row) {\n\t\treturn `${col},${row}`;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the region containing a point\n\t* \n\t* @param point - Point to find region for\n\t* @returns Region or null\n\t*/\n\tgetRegionAt(point) {\n\t\tfor (const region of this.regions) if (region.contains(point)) return region;\n\t\treturn null;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all regions that overlap with an AABB\n\t* \n\t* @param bounds - AABB to check\n\t* @returns Array of overlapping regions\n\t*/\n\tgetRegionsInBounds(bounds) {\n\t\tconst result = [];\n\t\tfor (const region of this.regions) if (region.getExpandedBounds().intersects(bounds)) result.push(region);\n\t\treturn result;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Adds an entity to the appropriate region\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to add\n\t*/\n\taddEntity(entity) {\n\t\tconst region = this.getRegionAt(entity.position);\n\t\tif (region) {\n\t\t\tregion.addEntity(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.entityRegionMap.set(entity, region);\n\t\t\tif (this.config.autoActivate) region.activate();\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes an entity from its region\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to remove\n\t*/\n\tremoveEntity(entity) {\n\t\tconst region = this.entityRegionMap.get(entity);\n\t\tif (region) {\n\t\t\tregion.removeEntity(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.entityRegionMap.delete(entity);\n\t\t\tif (this.config.autoActivate && region.getEntities().length === 0) region.deactivate();\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates entity positions and migrates them between regions if needed\n\t*/\n\tupdateEntities() {\n\t\tconst entitiesToMigrate = [];\n\t\tfor (const [entity, currentRegion] of this.entityRegionMap) if (!currentRegion.shouldContain(entity)) {\n\t\t\tconst newRegion = this.getRegionAt(entity.position);\n\t\t\tif (newRegion && newRegion !== currentRegion) entitiesToMigrate.push({\n\t\t\t\tentity,\n\t\t\t\tnewRegion\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor (const { entity, newRegion } of entitiesToMigrate) {\n\t\t\tconst oldRegion = collisions.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const engine = new PhysicsEngine({ timeStep: 1/60 });\n* const zones = new ZoneManager(engine);\n*\n* // Create a static zone\n* const zoneId = config.direction ?? \"down\";\n\t\tconst limitedByWalls = config.limitedByWalls ?? false;\n\t\tlet position;\n\t\tlet type;\n\t\tlet attachedEntity;\n\t\tlet offset;\n\t\tif (\"entity\" in config) zone.position.clone(),\n\t\t\tradius: zone.radius,\n\t\t\tangle: zone.angle,\n\t\t\tdirection: zone.direction,\n\t\t\tlimitedByWalls: zone.limitedByWalls,\n\t\t\tmetadata: zone.metadata\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all entities currently inside a zone\n\t*\n\t* @param id - Zone identifier\n\t* @returns Array of entities inside the zone\n\t*/\n\tgetEntitiesInZone(id) {\n\t\tconst zone = this.zones.get(id);\n\t\tif (!zone) return [];\n\t\tconst entities = [];\n\t\tfor (const uuid of zone.inside) {\n\t\t\tconst entity = this.engine.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\tif (entity) entities.push(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn entities;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all zone identifiers\n\t*\n\t* @returns Array of zone IDs\n\t*/\n\tgetAllZoneIds() {\n\t\treturn Array.from(this.zones.keys());\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clears all zones\n\t*/\n\tclear() {\n\t\tthis.zones.clear();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates all zones, detecting entities entering/exiting\n\t*\n\t* This should be called after each physics step to keep zones synchronized.\n\t*\n\t* @param _deltaTime - Optional delta time (not used currently, but kept for future use)\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* engine.step();\n\t* zones.update();\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tupdate(_deltaTime) {\n\t\tfor (const zone of this.zones.values()) {\n\t\t\tif (zone.type === \"attached\" && + offset.y);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tconst aabb = new AABB(zone.position.x - zone.radius, zone.position.y - zone.radius, zone.position.x + zone.radius, zone.position.y + zone.radius);\n\t\t\tconst candidates = this.engine.queryAABB(aabb);\n\t\t\tconst hits = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\t\tfor (const entity of candidates) {\n\t\t\t\tif (zone.attachedEntity && entity.uuid === zone.attachedEntity.uuid)
