(const uuid of hits) if (!previous.has(uuid)) {\n\t\t\t\tconst entity = this.engine.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\t\tif (entity) entered.push(entity);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor (const uuid of previous) if (!hits.has(uuid)) {\n\t\t\t\tconst entity = this.engine.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\t\tif (entity) exited.push(entity);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tzone.inside = hits;\n\t\t\tif (entered.length > 0 && zone.callbacks?.onEnter) zone.callbacks.onEnter(entered);\n\t\t\tif (exited.length > 0 && zone.callbacks?.onExit) zone.callbacks.onExit(exited);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if an entity is inside a zone\n\t*\n\t* @param zone - Zone record\n\t* @param entity - Entity to check\n\t* @returns True if the entity is inside the zone\n\t*/\n\tisEntityInsideZone(zone, entity) {\n\t\tconst zonePos = zone.position;\n\t\tconst entityPos = entity.position;\n\t\tconst dx = entityPos.x - zonePos.x;\n\t\tconst dy = entityPos.y - zonePos.y;\n\t\tif (Math.hypot(dx, dy) - (entity.radius > 0 ? entity.radius : Math.max(entity.width, entity.height) / 2) > zone.radius) return false;\n\t\tif (zone.angle < 360) {\n\t\t\tconst facing = this.directionToAngle(zone.direction);\n\t\t\tconst angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\n\t\t\tconst delta = this.normalizeAngle(angle - facing);\n\t\t\tconst halfAperture = zone.angle * Math.PI / 360;\n\t\t\tif (Math.abs(delta) > halfAperture) return false;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (zone.limitedByWalls) {\n\t\t\tif (!this.hasLineOfSight(zonePos, entityPos, entity.uuid)) return false;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if there's a clear line of sight between two points\n\t*\n\t* @param start - Start position\n\t* @param end - End position\n\t* @param ignoreEntityId - Entity UUID to ignore (usually the target entity)\n\t* @returns True if line of sight is clear\n\t*/\n\thasLineOfSight(start, end, ignoreEntityId) {\n\t\tconst direction = end.sub(start);\n\t\tconst distance = direction.length();\n\t\tif (distance < 1e-5) return true;\n\t\tdirection.normalizeInPlace();\n\t\treturn this.engine.raycast(start, direction, distance, void 0, (entity) => {\n\t\t\tif (!entity.isStatic()) return false;\n\t\t\tif (ignoreEntityId && entity.uuid === ignoreEntityId) return false;\n\t\t\treturn true;\n\t\t}) === null;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Converts direction string to angle in radians\n\t*\n\t* @param dir - Direction\n\t* @returns Angle in radians\n\t*/\n\tdirectionToAngle(dir) {\n\t\tswitch (dir) {\n\t\t\tcase \"up\": return -Math.PI / 2;\n\t\t\tcase \"down\": return Math.PI / 2;\n\t\t\tcase \"left\": return Math.PI;\n\t\t\tdefault: return 0;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Normalizes angle to [-π, π]\n\t*\n\t* @param angle - Angle in radians\n\t* @returns Normalized angle\n\t*/\n\tnormalizeAngle(angle) {\n\t\tlet a = angle;\n\t\twhile (a > Math.PI) a -= Math.PI * 2;\n\t\twhile (a < -Math.PI) a += Math.PI * 2;\n\t\treturn a;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/api/PhysicsEngine.ts\n/**\n* Main physics engine interface\n* \n* Provides a high-level, gameplay-oriented API for physics simulation.\n* Supports both single-world and multi-region simulation modes.\n* \n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const engine = new PhysicsEngine({ timeStep: 1/60 });\n* const entity = engine.createEntity({\n*   position: { x: 0, y: 0 },\n*   radius: 10,\n*   mass: 1\n* });\n* \n* engine.step();\n* ```\n*/\nvar PhysicsEngine = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new physics engine\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Engine configuration\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(config = {}) {\n\t\tthis.regionManager = null;\n\t\tthis.movementManager = null;\n\t\tthis.zoneManager = null;\n\t\tthis.tick = 0;\n\t\tthis.useRegions = config.enableRegions ?? false;\n\t\tif (this.useRegions) {\n\t\t\tif (!config.regionConfig) throw new Error(\"Region configuration is required when enableRegions is true\");\n\t\t\tthis.regionManager = new RegionManager(config.regionConfig);\n\t\t\tthis.world = new World({\n\t\t\t\t...config,\n\t\t\t\tenableSleep: false\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t} else this.world = new World(config);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the movement manager bound to this engine.\n\t*\n\t* The manager is lazily created and reused.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Movement manager instance\n\t*/\n\tgetMovementManager() {\n\t\tif (!this.movementManager) this.movementManager = MovementManager$1.forEngine(this);\n\t\treturn this.movementManager;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the zone manager bound to this engine.\n\t*\n\t* The manager is lazily created and reused. Zones allow detecting entities\n\t* within circular or cone-shaped areas without physical collisions (useful\n\t* for vision, skill ranges, explosions, etc.).\n\t*\n\t* **Important:** Call `zoneManager.update()` after each physics step to\n\t* keep zones synchronized:\n\t*\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* engine.step();\n\t* engine.getZoneManager().update();\n\t* ```\n\t*\n\t* @returns Zone manager instance\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const zones = engine.getZoneManager();\n\t* const visionZone = zones.createAttachedZone(player, {\n\t*   radius: 100,\n\t*   angle: 90,\n\t*   direction: 'right',\n\t* }, {\n\t*   onEnter: (entities) => console.log('Player sees:', entities),\n\t* });\n\t*\n\t* engine.step();\n\t* zones.update();\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetZoneManager() {\n\t\tif (!this.zoneManager) this.zoneManager = new ZoneManager(this);\n\t\treturn this.zoneManager;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates all registered movement strategies.\n\t*\n\t* @param dt - Time delta in seconds (defaults to the world's time step)\n\t*/\n\tupdateMovements(dt) {\n\t\tconst manager = this.getMovementManager();\n\t\tconst delta = dt ?? this.world.getTimeStep();\n\t\tmanager.update(delta);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates movements and then steps the simulation.\n\t*\n\t* @param dt - Time delta in seconds (defaults to the world's time step)\n\t*/\n\tstepWithMovements(dt) {\n\t\tthis.updateMovements(dt);\n\t\tthis.step();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Advances the simulation by exactly one fixed tick.\n\t*\n\t* This helper is equivalent to {@link step} but returns the tick index after the step,\n\t* making it convenient for client-side prediction loops.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Current tick index after stepping\n\t*/\n\tstepOneTick() {\n\t\tthis.step();\n\t\treturn this.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Advances the simulation by a fixed number of ticks.\n\t*\n\t* @param ticks - Number of ticks to simulate (>= 1)\n\t* @returns Current tick index after stepping\n\t*/\n\tstepTicks(ticks) {\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(ticks) || ticks <= 0) return this.tick;\n\t\tconst total = Math.floor(ticks);\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < total; i += 1) this.step();\n\t\treturn this.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new entity\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Entity configuration\n\t* @returns Created entity\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const entity = engine.createEntity({\n\t*   position: { x: 100, y: 100 },\n\t*   radius: 15,\n\t*   mass: 1,\n\t*   velocity: { x: 5, y: 0 }\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tcreateEntity(config) {\n\t\tconst entity = new Entity(config);\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.addEntity(entity);\n\t\telse this.world.addEntity(entity);\n\t\treturn entity;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Adds an existing entity to the engine\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to add\n\t* @returns The added entity\n\t*/\n\taddEntity(entity) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.addEntity(entity);\n\t\telse this.world.addEntity(entity);\n\t\treturn entity;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes an entity from the engine\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to remove\n\t*/\n\tremoveEntity(entity) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.removeEntity(entity);\n\t\telse this.world.removeEntity(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all entities\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of all entities\n\t*/\n\tgetEntities() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tconst entities = [];\n\t\t\tfor (const region of this.regionManager.getRegions()) entities.push(...region.getEntities());\n\t\t\treturn entities;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn this.world.getEntities();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets an entity by UUID\n\t* \n\t* @param uuid - Entity UUID\n\t* @returns Entity or undefined\n\t*/\n\tgetEntityByUUID(uuid) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tfor (const region of this.regionManager.getRegions()) {\n\t\t\t\tconst entity = region.getWorld().getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\t\tif (entity) return entity;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn this.world.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Steps the physics simulation forward\n\t* \n\t* Updates all entities, detects and resolves collisions.\n\t*/\n\tstep() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.step();\n\t\telse this.world.step();\n\t\tthis.tick += 1;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the event system\n\t* \n\t* @returns Event system instance\n\t*/\n\tgetEvents() {\n\t\treturn this.world.getEvents();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Applies a force to an entity\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to apply force to\n\t* @param force - Force vector\n\t*/\n\tapplyForce(entity, force) {\n\t\tentity.applyForce(force);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Applies an impulse to an entity\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to apply impulse to\n\t* @param impulse - Impulse vector\n\t*/\n\tapplyImpulse(entity, impulse) {\n\t\tentity.applyImpulse(impulse);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Teleports an entity to a new position\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to teleport\n\t* @param position - New position\n\t*/\n\tteleport(entity, position) {\n\t\tentity.teleport(position);\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.updateEntities();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Freezes an entity (makes it static)\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to freeze\n\t*/\n\tfreeze(entity) {\n\t\tentity.freeze();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Unfreezes an entity (makes it dynamic)\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to unfreeze\n\t*/\n\tunfreeze(entity) {\n\t\tentity.unfreeze();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Queries entities in an AABB region\n\t* \n\t* @param bounds - AABB to query\n\t* @returns Array of entities in the region\n\t*/\n\tqueryAABB(bounds) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tconst entities = [];\n\t\t\tconst regions = this.regionManager.getRegionsInBounds(bounds);\n\t\t\tfor (const region of regions) {\n\t\t\t\tconst worldEntities = region.getWorld().getEntities();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const entity of worldEntities) if (bounds.contains(entity.position)) entities.push(entity);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn entities;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst world = this.world;\n\t\tif (world.spatialPartition) return Array.from(world.spatialPartition.queryAABB(bounds));\n\t\treturn this.world.getEntities().filter((e) => bounds.contains(e.position));\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clears all entities from the engine\n\t*/\n\tclear() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.clear();\n\t\telse this.world.clear();\n\t\tthis.tick = 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Assigns a polygon collider to an entity (supports convex or concave via convex parts).\n\t*\n\t* Design: the collider is attached via a registry and used by the detector on demand.\n\t* This keeps entities lightweight and preserves the separation of detection/resolution.\n\t*\n\t* @param entity - Target entity\n\t* @param config - Polygon configuration\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* engine.assignPolygonCollider(entity, { vertices: [new Vector2(-1,-1), new Vector2(1,-1), new Vector2(1,1), new Vector2(-1,1)], isConvex: true });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tassignPolygonCollider(entity, config) {\n\t\tassignPolygonCollider(entity, config);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Casts a ray in the physics world and returns the nearest hit, if any.\n\t* Uses the world's spatial partition for broad-phase and shape-specific narrow-phase tests.\n\t*\n\t* @param origin - Ray origin\n\t* @param direction - Ray direction (any length)\n\t* @param maxDistance - Maximum cast length\n\t* @param mask - Optional collision mask (layer)\n\t* @param filter - Optional filter function (return true to include entity)\n\t* @returns Raycast hit or null\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const hit = engine.raycast(new Vector2(0,0), new Vector2(1,0), 1000);\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\traycast(origin, direction, maxDistance, mask, filter) {\n\t\tconst partition = this.world.spatialPartition;\n\t\tif (!partition) return null;\n\t\treturn raycast(partition, origin, direction, maxDistance, mask, filter);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Computes continuous collision detection (sweep test) time-of-impact between two entities\n\t* over the next step of duration `dt`, using relative motion.\n\t*\n\t* @param a - First entity\n\t* @param b - Second entity\n\t* @param dt - Time step duration\n\t* @returns Sweep result or null if no hit in [0,1]\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const toi = engine.sweep(entityA, entityB, 1/60);\n\t* if (toi) {\n\t*   // pre-resolve or clamp motion\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tsweep(a, b, dt) {\n\t\treturn sweepEntities(a, b, a.velocity.sub(b.velocity).mul(dt));\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets statistics about the engine\n\t* \n\t* @returns Statistics object\n\t*/\n\tgetStats() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tconst regionStats = this.regionManager.getStats();\n\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t...this.world.getStats(),\n\t\t\t\tregions: {\n\t\t\t\t\ttotal: regionStats.totalRegions,\n\t\t\t\t\tactive: regionStats.activeRegions\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn this.world.getStats();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the underlying world instance\n\t* \n\t* @returns World instance\n\t*/\n\tgetWorld() {\n\t\treturn this.world;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the current simulation tick.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Tick counter (starts at 0 and increments after each {@link step})\n\t*/\n\tgetTick() {\n\t\treturn this.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Captures a lightweight snapshot of the current world state.\n\t*\n\t* The snapshot only stores the minimum data required for client-side prediction:\n\t* position, velocity, rotation, angular velocity and sleeping flag per entity.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Snapshot object\n\t*/\n\ttakeSnapshot() {\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\ttick: this.tick,\n\t\t\tentities: this.getEntities().map((entity) => ({\n\t\t\t\tuuid: entity.uuid,\n\t\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: entity.position.x,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: entity.position.y\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tvelocity: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: entity.velocity.x,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: entity.velocity.y\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\trotation: entity.rotation,\n\t\t\t\tangularVelocity: entity.angularVelocity,\n\t\t\t\tsleeping: entity.isSleeping()\n\t\t\t}))\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Restores a snapshot previously produced by {@link takeSnapshot}.\n\t*\n\t* Entities that cannot be found in the current engine are skipped silently.\n\t*\n\t* @param snapshot - Snapshot to restore\n\t*/\n\trestoreSnapshot(snapshot) {\n\t\tconst entities = new Map(this.getEntities().map((entity) => [entity.uuid, entity]));\n\t\tfor (const state of snapshot.entities) {\n\t\t\tconst entity = entities.get(state.uuid);\n\t\t\tif (!entity) continue;\n\t\t\tentity.position.set(state.position.x, state.position.y);\n\t\t\tentity.velocity.set(state.velocity.x, state.velocity.y);\n\t\t\tentity.rotation = state.rotation;\n\t\t\tentity.angularVelocity = state.angularVelocity;\n\t\t\tif (state.sleeping) entity.sleep();\n\t\t\telse entity.wakeUp();\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.tick = snapshot.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the region manager (if regions are enabled)\n\t* \n\t* @returns Region manager or null\n\t*/\n\tgetRegionManager() {\n\t\treturn this.regionManager;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/Dash.ts\n/**\n* Applies a burst of velocity during a fixed duration.\n*\n* The dash sets a constant velocity along a direction, then stops the entity\n* once the duration has elapsed.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(player, new Dash(8, { x: 1, y: 0 }, 0.15));\n* ```\n*/\nvar Dash = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a dash movement.\n\t*\n\t* @param speed - Movement speed in units per second\n\t* @param direction - Direction vector (will be normalized)\n\t* @param duration - Duration in seconds\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(speed, direction, duration) {\n\t\tthis.speed = speed;\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.finished = false;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.finished) return;\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.elapsed <= this.duration) body.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: this.direction.x * this.speed,\n\t\t\ty: this.direction.y * this.speed\n\t\t});\n\t\telse {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.finished;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/IceMovement.ts\n/**\n* Simulates slippery movement with gradual acceleration and deceleration.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const ice = new IceMovement({ x: 1, y: 0 }, 3, 0.25, 0.1);\n* movementManager.add(player, ice);\n* ```\n*/\nvar IceMovement = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates an ice-like movement behaviour.\n\t*\n\t* @param direction - Initial desired direction (normalized automatically)\n\t* @param maxSpeed - Maximum speed in units per second\n\t* @param acceleration - Fraction of the gap closed per second (0-1)\n\t* @param friction - Fraction of velocity retained per second when stopping (0-1)\n\t* @param duration - Optional duration in seconds\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(direction, maxSpeed = 4, acceleration = .2, friction = .08, duration) {\n\t\tthis.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tthis.acceleration = acceleration;\n\t\tthis.friction = friction;\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.currentVelocity = {\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.stopped = false;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.targetDirection = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.duration !== void 0) {\n\t\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\t\tif (this.elapsed >= this.duration) this.stopped = true;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (!this.stopped) {\n\t\t\tconst accelFactor = this.perSecondFactor(this.acceleration, dt);\n\t\t\tconst targetVx = this.targetDirection.x * this.maxSpeed;\n\t\t\tconst targetVy = this.targetDirection.y * this.maxSpeed;\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.x += (targetVx - this.currentVelocity.x) * accelFactor;\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.y += (targetVy - this.currentVelocity.y) * accelFactor;\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tconst frictionFactor = this.perSecondFactor(this.friction, dt);\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.x *= 1 - frictionFactor;\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.y *= 1 - frictionFactor;\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: this.currentVelocity.x,\n\t\t\ty: this.currentVelocity.y\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\tif (!this.stopped) return false;\n\t\treturn Math.hypot(this.currentVelocity.x, this.currentVelocity.y) < .05;\n\t}\n\tstop() {\n\t\tthis.stopped = true;\n\t}\n\tresume() {\n\t\tthis.stopped = false;\n\t}\n\tsetTargetDirection(direction) {\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.targetDirection.x = magnitude > 0 ? direction.x / magnitude : 0;\n\t\tthis.targetDirection.y = magnitude > 0 ? direction.y / magnitude : 0;\n\t\tthis.stopped = false;\n\t}\n\tsetParameters(maxSpeed, acceleration, friction) {\n\t\tif (maxSpeed !== void 0) this.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tif (acceleration !== void 0) this.acceleration = acceleration;\n\t\tif (friction !== void 0) this.friction = friction;\n\t}\n\tperSecondFactor(value, dt) {\n\t\tconst clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value));\n\t\tif (dt <= 0) return clamped;\n\t\treturn 1 - Math.pow(1 - clamped, dt);\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/Knockback.ts\n/**\n* Simulates an impulse that pushes an entity away and gradually decays.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(enemy, new Knockback({ x: -1, y: 0 }, 12, 0.25, 0.4));\n* ```\n*/\nvar Knockback = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a knockback movement.\n\t*\n\t* @param direction - Direction of the impulse (will be normalized)\n\t* @param initialSpeed - Initial speed in units per second\n\t* @param duration - Duration in seconds\n\t* @param decayFactor - Fraction of speed preserved per second (0-1)\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(direction, initialSpeed, duration, decayFactor = .35) {\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.decayFactor = decayFactor;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.currentSpeed = initialSpeed;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.elapsed <= this.duration) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: this.direction.x * this.currentSpeed,\n\t\t\t\ty: this.direction.y * this.currentSpeed\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tconst decay = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, this.decayFactor));\n\t\t\tif (decay === 0) this.currentSpeed = 0;\n\t\t\telse if (decay === 1) {} else this.currentSpeed *= Math.pow(decay, dt);\n\t\t} else body.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.elapsed >= this.duration;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/LinearRepulsion.ts\n/**\n* Seeks a target while repelling from nearby obstacles using a linear falloff.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const strategy = new LinearRepulsion(\n*   engine,\n*   () => player.position.clone(),\n*   3,\n*   2,\n*   5,\n* );\n* movementManager.add(enemy, strategy);\n* ```\n*/\nvar LinearRepulsion = class {\n\t/**\n\t* @param engine - Physics engine used for spatial queries\n\t* @param targetProvider - Function returning the target position\n\t* @param maxSpeed - Maximum speed in units per second\n\t* @param repulseRadius - Radius used to sample nearby obstacles\n\t* @param repulseWeight - Weight of the repulsion force\n\t* @param ignoredEntity - Optional entity to exclude from avoidance (e.g. the target)\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(engine, targetProvider, maxSpeed = 2.5, repulseRadius = 2, repulseWeight = 4, ignoredEntity) {\n\t\tthis.engine = engine;\n\t\tthis.targetProvider = targetProvider;\n\t\tthis.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\tthis.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t\tthis.ignoredEntity = ignoredEntity;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, _dt) {\n\t\tconst entity = body.getEntity?.();\n\t\tif (!entity) throw new Error(\"LinearRepulsion requires a movement body backed by a physics entity.\");\n\t\tconst targetPosition = this.targetProvider();\n\t\tconst toTarget = new Vector2(targetPosition.x - entity.position.x, targetPosition.y - entity.position.y);\n\t\tconst distance = toTarget.length();\n\t\tif (distance > 0) toTarget.divInPlace(distance);\n\t\telse toTarget.set(0, 0);\n\t\tconst bounds = AABB.fromCenterSize(entity.position.x, entity.position.y, this.repulseRadius * 2, this.repulseRadius * 2);\n\t\tconst neighbors = this.engine.queryAABB(bounds);\n\t\tconst ignored = this.ignoredEntity?.();\n\t\tconst push = new Vector2(0, 0);\n\t\tfor (const other of neighbors) {\n\t\t\tif (other === entity || other === ignored || other.isStatic()) continue;\n\t\t\tconst diff = new Vector2(entity.position.x - other.position.x, entity.position.y - other.position.y);\n\t\t\tconst d2 = diff.lengthSquared();\n\t\t\tif (d2 > this.repulseRadiusSq || d2 === 0) continue;\n\t\t\tconst d = Math.sqrt(d2);\n\t\t\tconst weight = this.repulseWeight * (this.repulseRadius - Math.min(d, this.repulseRadius)) / this.repulseRadius;\n\t\t\tpush.addInPlace(diff.mul(weight / d));\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst maxPush = this.maxSpeed * 3;\n\t\tconst pushLength = push.length();\n\t\tif (pushLength > maxPush && pushLength > 0) push.mulInPlace(maxPush / pushLength);\n\t\tconst desired = toTarget.mul(this.maxSpeed).add(push);\n\t\tconst desiredLength = desired.length();\n\t\tif (desiredLength > this.maxSpeed && desiredLength > 0) desired.mulInPlace(this.maxSpeed / desiredLength);\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(desired.x) || !Number.isFinite(desired.y)) {\n\t\t\tentity.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity(desired);\n\t}\n\tsetParameters(maxSpeed, repulseRadius, repulseWeight) {\n\t\tif (maxSpeed !== void 0) this.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tif (repulseRadius !== void 0) {\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (repulseWeight !== void 0) this.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/Oscillate.ts\n/**\n* Oscillates an entity around its initial position using different wave patterns.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(platform, new Oscillate({ x: 1, y: 0 }, 2, 3, 'sine'));\n* ```\n*/\nvar Oscillate = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates an oscillating movement.\n\t*\n\t* @param direction - Base direction (will be normalized)\n\t* @param amplitude - Maximum displacement from the anchor position\n\t* @param period - Duration of a full cycle in seconds\n\t* @param type - Oscillation pattern\n\t* @param duration - Total life time in seconds (undefined for infinite)\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(direction, amplitude, period, type = \"sine\", duration) {\n\t\tthis.amplitude = amplitude;\n\t\tthis.period = period;\n\t\tthis.type = type;\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.anchor = null;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.anchor === null) this.anchor = {\n\t\t\tx: body.position.x,\n\t\t\ty: body.position.y\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.duration !== void 0 && this.elapsed >= this.duration) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst cycle = this.period <= 0 ? 0 : this.elapsed % this.period / this.period;\n\t\tconst frequency = this.period > 0 ? 2 * Math.PI / this.period : 0;\n\t\tlet velocityScale;\n\t\tswitch (this.type) {\n\t\t\tcase \"sine\":\n\t\t\t\tvelocityScale = Math.cos(cycle * Math.PI * 2) * frequency * this.amplitude;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase \"circular\":\n\t\t\t\tvelocityScale = Math.cos(cycle * Math.PI * 2) * frequency * this.amplitude;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase \"linear\":\n\t\t\t\tvelocityScale = (cycle < .5 ? 1 : -1) * (2 * this.amplitude) / (this.period / 2);\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tdefault: velocityScale = 0;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst vx = this.direction.x * velocityScale;\n\t\tconst vy = this.direction.y * velocityScale;\n\t\tif (this.type === \"circular\") {\n\t\t\tconst perpendicularScale = -Math.sin(cycle * Math.PI * 2) * frequency * this.amplitude;\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: vx - this.direction.y * perpendicularScale,\n\t\t\t\ty: vy + this.direction.x * perpendicularScale\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t} else body.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: vx,\n\t\t\ty: vy\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.duration !== void 0 && this.elapsed >= this.duration;\n\t}\n\treset() {\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.anchor = null;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/PathFollow.ts\n/**\n* Makes an entity follow a list of waypoints at a constant speed.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(npc, new PathFollow(\n*   [{ x: 0, y: 0 }, { x: 4, y: 0 }, { x: 4, y: 4 }],\n*   1.5,\n*   true,\n*   0.5,\n* ));\n* ```\n*/\nvar PathFollow = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a path-following strategy.\n\t*\n\t* @param waypoints - List of waypoints to traverse\n\t* @param speed - Travel speed in units per second\n\t* @param loop - When true, restart from the first waypoint\n\t* @param pauseAtWaypoints - Optional pause duration (seconds) at each waypoint\n\t* @param tolerance - Distance tolerance to consider a waypoint reached\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(waypoints, speed, loop = false, pauseAtWaypoints = 0, tolerance = .1) {\n\t\tthis.waypoints = waypoints;\n\t\tthis.speed = speed;\n\t\tthis.loop = loop;\n\t\tthis.pauseAtWaypoints = pauseAtWaypoints;\n\t\tthis.tolerance = tolerance;\n\t\tthis.currentWaypoint = 0;\n\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\tthis.paused = false;\n\t\tthis.finished = false;\n\t\tthis.direction = {\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tif (waypoints.length === 0) this.finished = true;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.finished || this.waypoints.length === 0) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.paused) {\n\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause += dt;\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tif (this.elapsedPause >= this.pauseAtWaypoints) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.paused = false;\n\t\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\t\t} else return;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst target = this.waypoints[this.currentWaypoint];\n\t\tif (!target) {\n\t\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst dx = target.x - body.position.x;\n\t\tconst dy = target.y - body.position.y;\n\t\tconst distance = Math.hypot(dx, dy);\n\t\tif (distance <= this.tolerance) {\n\t\t\tthis.currentWaypoint += 1;\n\t\t\tif (this.currentWaypoint >= this.waypoints.length) if (this.loop) this.currentWaypoint = 0;\n\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (this.pauseAtWaypoints > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.paused = true;\n\t\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (distance > 0) this.direction = {\n\t\t\tx: dx / distance,\n\t\t\ty: dy / distance\n\t\t};\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: this.direction.x * this.speed,\n\t\t\ty: this.direction.y * this.speed\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.finished;\n\t}\n\tgetCurrentWaypoint() {\n\t\treturn this.currentWaypoint;\n\t}\n\tsetWaypoints(waypoints, reset = true) {\n\t\tthis.waypoints = waypoints;\n\t\tthis.finished = waypoints.length === 0;\n\t\tif (reset) {\n\t\t\tthis.currentWaypoint = 0;\n\t\t\tthis.paused = false;\n\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/ProjectileMovement.ts\n/**\n* Type of projectile trajectory.\n*/\nvar ProjectileType = /* @__PURE__ */ function(ProjectileType) {\n\tProjectileType[\"Straight\"] = \"straight\";\n\tProjectileType[\"Arc\"] = \"arc\";\n\tProjectileType[\"Bounce\"] = \"bounce\";\n\treturn ProjectileType;\n}({});\nvar ProjectileStage = /* @__PURE__ */ function(ProjectileStage) {\n\tProjectileStage[ProjectileStage[\"Flying\"] = 0] = \"Flying\";\n\tProjectileStage[ProjectileStage[\"Rolling\"] = 1] = \"Rolling\";\n\tProjectileStage[ProjectileStage[\"Finished\"] = 2] = \"Finished\";\n\treturn ProjectileStage;\n}(ProjectileStage || {});\n/**\n* Moves an entity following a projectile trajectory.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const projectile = new ProjectileMovement(ProjectileType.Arc, {\n*   speed: 12,\n*   direction: { x: 1, y: 0 },\n*   maxHeight: 3,\n*   gravity: 30,\n* });\n* movementManager.add(entity, projectile);\n* ```\n*/\nvar ProjectileMovement = class {\n\tconstructor(type, options) {\n\t\tthis.type = type;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.distanceTraveled = 0;\n\t\tthis.startPosition = null;\n\t\tthis.bounceCount = 0;\n\t\tthis.stage = ProjectileStage.Flying;\n\t\tthis.finished = false;\n\t\tthis.currentHeight = 0;\n\t\tthis.verticalVelocity = 0;\n\t\tthis.options = {\n\t\t\tspeed: options.speed,\n\t\t\tdirection: options.direction,\n\t\t\tinitialHeight: 0,\n\t\t\tmaxHeight: 2,\n\t\t\tgravity: 30,\n\t\t\tmaxBounces: 0,\n\t\t\tbounciness: .6,\n\t\t\tdrag: 0,\n\t\t\t...options\n\t\t};\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(this.options.direction.x, this.options.direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: this.options.direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: this.options.direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.currentHeight = this.options.initialHeight ?? 0;\n\t\tif (this.type === ProjectileType.Arc || this.type === ProjectileType.Bounce) {\n\t\t\tconst gravity = this.options.gravity ?? 30;\n\t\t\tconst maxHeight = this.options.maxHeight ?? 2;\n\t\t\tthis.verticalVelocity = Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, 2 * gravity * maxHeight));\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.finished || dt <= 0) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.startPosition === null) this.startPosition = new Vector2(body.position.x, body.position.y);\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.options.lifetime !== void 0 && this.elapsed >= this.options.lifetime) {\n\t\t\tthis.finish(body);\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tswitch (this.stage) {\n\t\t\tcase ProjectileStage.Flying:\n\t\t\t\tthis.updateFlying(body, dt);\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase ProjectileStage.Rolling:\n\t\t\t\tthis.updateRolling(body, dt);\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase ProjectileStage.Finished:\n\t\t\t\tthis.finish(body);\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.startPosition) {\n\t\t\tthis.distanceTraveled = new Vector2(body.position.x, body.position.y).distanceTo(this.startPosition);\n\t\t\tif (this.options.maxRange !== void 0 && this.distanceTraveled >= this.options.maxRange) this.finish(body);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.finished;\n\t}\n\tgetHeight() {\n\t\treturn this.currentHeight;\n\t}\n\tgetProgress() {\n\t\tif (this.options.maxRange) return Math.min(1, this.distanceTraveled / this.options.maxRange);\n\t\tif (this.options.lifetime) return Math.min(1, this.elapsed / this.options.lifetime);\n\t\treturn 0;\n\t}\n\tupdateFlying(body, dt) {\n\t\tlet vx = this.direction.x * this.options.speed;\n\t\tlet vy = this.direction.y * this.options.speed;\n\t\tconst drag = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, this.options.drag ?? 0));\n\t\tif (drag > 0) {\n\t\t\tconst dragFactor = Math.pow(1 - drag, dt);\n\t\t\tvx *= dragFactor;\n\t\t\tvy *= dragFactor;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.type === ProjectileType.Arc || this.type === ProjectileType.Bounce) {\n\t\t\tconst gravity = this.options.gravity ?? 30;\n\t\t\tthis.verticalVelocity -= gravity * dt;\n\t\t\tthis.currentHeight += this.verticalVelocity * dt;\n\t\t\tif (this.options.onHeightUpdate) this.options.onHeightUpdate(this.currentHeight, body);\n\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\tconst dispatcher = globalThis;\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof dispatcher.dispatchEvent === \"function\" && typeof CustomEvent !== \"undefined\") {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst event = new CustomEvent(\"projectile:height\", { detail: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: body.id,\n\t\t\t\t\t\theight: this.currentHeight\n\t\t\t\t\t} });\n\t\t\t\t\tdispatcher.dispatchEvent(event);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (this.currentHeight <= 0) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.currentHeight = 0;\n\t\t\t\tif (this.type === ProjectileType.Bounce) if (this.bounceCount < (this.options.maxBounces ?? 0)) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst bounceEnergy = this.options.bounciness ?? .6;\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.verticalVelocity = Math.abs(this.verticalVelocity) * bounceEnergy;\n\t\t\t\t\tvx *= bounceEnergy;\n\t\t\t\t\tvy *= bounceEnergy;\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.bounceCount += 1;\n\t\t\t\t} else this.stage = ProjectileStage.Rolling;\n\t\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.finish(body);\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: vx,\n\t\t\ty: vy\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tupdateRolling(body, dt) {\n\t\tconst friction = .85;\n\t\tconst vx = body.velocity.x * Math.pow(friction, dt * 60);\n\t\tconst vy = body.velocity.y * Math.pow(friction, dt * 60);\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: vx,\n\t\t\ty: vy\n\t\t});\n\t\tif (Math.abs(vx) < .1 && Math.abs(vy) < .1) this.finish(body);\n\t}\n\tfinish(body) {\n\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\tthis.stage = ProjectileStage.Finished;\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t});\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/SeekAvoid.ts\nvar EPSILON = .001;\n/**\n* Seeks a moving target while avoiding nearby obstacles.\n*\n* The strategy combines a pull towards the target with repulsive forces from\n* close entities, creating smooth avoidance behaviour.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const seek = new SeekAvoid(engine, () => playerEntity, 3, 2, 6, 0.5);\n* movementManager.add(enemy, seek);\n* ```\n*/\nvar SeekAvoid = class {\n\t/**\n\t* @param engine - Physics engine used for spatial queries\n\t* @param targetProvider - Function returning the target entity (or null)\n\t* @param maxSpeed - Maximum speed in units per second\n\t* @param repulseRadius - Radius in which obstacles apply repulsion\n\t* @param repulseWeight - Strength of the repulsion force\n\t* @param arriveRadius - Distance considered as arrival\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(engine, targetProvider, maxSpeed = 2.5, repulseRadius = 2, repulseWeight = 4, arriveRadius = .5) {\n\t\tthis.engine = engine;\n\t\tthis.targetProvider = targetProvider;\n\t\tthis.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\tthis.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t\tthis.arriveRadiusSq = arriveRadius * arriveRadius;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, _dt) {\n\t\tconst entity = body.getEntity?.();\n\t\tif (!entity) throw new Error(\"SeekAvoid requires a movement body backed by a physics entity.\");\n\t\tconst target = this.targetProvider();\n\t\tif (!target) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst toTarget = new Vector2(target.position.x - entity.position.x, target.position.y - entity.position.y);\n\t\tconst distSq = toTarget.lengthSquared();\n\t\tlet arrived = false;\n\t\tif (distSq <= this.arriveRadiusSq) {\n\t\t\ttoTarget.set(0, 0);\n\t\t\tarrived = true;\n\t\t} else if (distSq > 0) toTarget.divInPlace(Math.sqrt(distSq));\n\t\tconst bounds = AABB.fromCenterSize(entity.position.x, entity.position.y, this.repulseRadius * 2, this.repulseRadius * 2);\n\t\tconst neighbors = this.engine.queryAABB(bounds);\n\t\tconst push = new Vector2(0, 0);\n\t\tlet neighborCount = 0;\n\t\tif (!arrived) for (const other of neighbors) {\n\t\t\tif (other === entity || other === target || other.isStatic()) continue;\n\t\t\tconst diff = new Vector2(entity.position.x - other.position.x, entity.position.y - other.position.y);\n\t\t\tlet d2 = diff.lengthSquared();\n\t\t\tif (d2 > this.repulseRadiusSq) continue;\n\t\t\tneighborCount++;\n\t\t\tif (d2 < EPSILON) d2 = EPSILON;\n\t\t\tconst weight = this.repulseWeight / d2;\n\t\t\tpush.addInPlace(diff.mul(weight));\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst pushLength = push.length();\n\t\tconst maxPush = this.maxSpeed * .5;\n\t\tif (pushLength > maxPush && pushLength > 0) push.mulInPlace(maxPush / pushLength);\n\t\tconst desired = toTarget.mul(this.maxSpeed).add(push);\n\t\tconst desiredLength = desired.length();\n\t\tconst maxCombinedSpeed = this.maxSpeed * 1.5;\n\t\tif (desiredLength > maxCombinedSpeed && desiredLength > 0) desired.mulInPlace(maxCombinedSpeed / desiredLength);\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(desired.x) || !Number.isFinite(desired.y)) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity(desired);\n\t}\n\tsetParameters(maxSpeed, repulseRadius, repulseWeight, arriveRadius) {\n\t\tif (maxSpeed !== void 0) this.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tif (repulseRadius !== void 0) {\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (repulseWeight !== void 0) this.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t\tif (arriveRadius !== void 0) this.arriveRadiusSq = arriveRadius * arriveRadius;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/movement/MovementManager.ts\n/**\n* Thin proxy around the physics movement manager.\n*\n* Delegates every operation to the deterministic engine provided by `PhysicsEngine`\n* so strategies operate on the exact same entities as the physics simulation.\n*/\nvar MovementManager = class {\n\tconstructor(physicProvider) {\n\t\tthis.physicProvider = physicProvider;\n\t}\n\tget core() {\n\t\treturn this.physicProvider().getMovementManager();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Adds a movement strategy and returns a Promise that resolves when it completes.\n\t* \n\t* @param id - Entity identifier\n\t* @param strategy - Movement strategy to add\n\t* @param options - Optional callbacks for movement lifecycle events\n\t* @returns Promise that resolves when the movement completes\n\t*/\n\tadd(id, strategy, options) {\n\t\treturn this.core.add(id, strategy, options);\n\t}\n\tremove(id, strategy) {\n\t\treturn this.core.remove(id, strategy);\n\t}\n\tclear(id) {\n\t\tthis.core.clear(id);\n\t}\n\tstopMovement(id) {\n\t\tthis.core.stopMovement(id);\n\t}\n\thasActiveStrategies(id) {\n\t\treturn this.core.hasActiveStrategies(id);\n\t}\n\tgetStrategies(id) {\n\t\treturn this.core.getStrategies(id);\n\t}\n\tupdate(dtMs) {\n\t\tthis.core.update(dtMs / 1e3);\n\t}\n\tclearAll() {\n\t\tthis.core.clearAll();\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/rooms/Map.ts\nvar RpgCommonMap = class {\n\tconstructor() {\n\t\tthis.data = signal(null);\n\t\tthis.physic = new PhysicsEngine({\n\t\t\ttimeStep: 1 / 60,\n\t\t\tgravity: new Vector2(0, 0),\n\t\t\tenableSleep: false\n\t\t});\n\t\tthis.moveManager = new MovementManager(() => this.physic);\n\t\tthis.speedScalar = 50;\n\t\tthis.tileWidth = 32;\n\t\tthis.tileHeight = 32;\n\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs = 0;\n\t\tthis.physicsSyncDepth = 0;\n\t\tthis.autoTickEnabled = true;\n\t\tthis.tick$ = new Observable((observer) => {\n\t\t\tconst interval = setInterval(() => {\n\t\t\t\tobserver.next({\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta: 16,\n\t\t\t\t\ttimestamp: Date.now()\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t}, 16);\n\t\t\treturn () => clearInterval(interval);\n\t\t}).pipe(share());\n\t}\n\tget isStandalone() {\n\t\treturn typeof window !== \"undefined\";\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get the width of the map in pixels\n\t* \n\t* @returns The width of the map in pixels, or 0 if not loaded\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const width = map.widthPx;\n\t* console.log(`Map width: ${width}px`);\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tget widthPx() {\n\t\treturn this.data()?.width ?? 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get the height of the map in pixels\n\t* \n\t* @returns The height of the map in pixels, or 0 if not loaded\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const height = this.data()?.id ?? \"\";\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get the X position of this map in the world coordinate system\n\t* \n\t* This is used when maps are part of a larger world map. The world position\n\t* indicates where this map is located relative to other maps.\n\t* \n\t* @returns The X position in world coordinates, or 0 if not in a world\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const worldX = map.worldX;\n\t* console.log(`Map is at world position (${worldX}, ${map.worldY})`);\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tget worldX() {\n\t\tconst worldMaps = this.getWorldMapsManager?.();\n\t\tif (!worldMaps) return 0;\n\t\tconst mapId = this.id.startsWith(\"map-\") ? this.id.slice(4) : this.id;\n\t\treturn worldMaps.getMapInfo(mapId)?.worldX ?? 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get the Y position of this map in the world coordinate system\n\t* \n\t* This is used when maps are part of a larger world map. The world position\n\t* indicates where this map is located relative to other maps.\n\t* \n\t* @returns The Y position in world coordinates, or 0 if not in a world\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* (!worldMaps) return 0;\n\t\tconst mapId = this.id.startsWith(\"map-\") ? this.id.slice(4) : this.id;\n\t\treturn worldMaps.getMapInfo(mapId)?.worldY ?? 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clear all physics content and reset to initial state\n\t* \n\t* This method completely clears the physics system by:\n\t* - Removing all hitboxes (static and movable)\n\t* - Removing all zones\n\t* - Clearing all collision data and events\n\t* - Clearing all movement events and sliding data\n\t* - Unsubscribing from the tick subscription\n\t* - Resetting the physics engine to a clean state\n\t* \n\t* Use this method when you need to completely reset the map's physics\n\t* system, such as when changing maps or restarting a level.\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Clear all physics when changing maps\n\t* map.clearPhysic();\n\t* \n\t* // Then reload physics for the new map\n\t* map.loadPhysic();\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tclearPhysic() {\n\t\tif (this.tickSubscription) {\n\t\t\tthis.tickSubscription.unsubscribe();\n\t\t\tthis.tickSubscription = null;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.playersSubscription) {\n\t\t\tthis.playersSubscription.unsubscribe();\n\t\t\tthis.playersSubscription = null;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.eventsSubscription)
