null;\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.clearAll();\n\t\tthis.moveManager.clearAll();\n\t\tthis.emitPhysicsReset();\n\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs = 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clear all physics entities and internal state\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\tclearAll() {\n\t\tconst entities = this.physic.getEntities();\n\t\tfor (const entity of entities) {\n\t\t\tconst owner = entity.owner;\n\t\t\tif (owner) this.emitPhysicsEntityRemove({\n\t\t\t\towner,\n\t\t\t\tentity,\n\t\t\t\tkind: this.resolvePhysicsEntityKind(owner, entity.uuid)\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tthis.unbindCharacterSignalSync(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.physic.removeEntity(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.physic.getMovementManager().clearAll();\n\t\tthis.physic.getZoneManager().clear();\n\t}\n\tloadPhysic() {\n\t\tthis.clearPhysic();\n\t\tconst mapData = this.data?.();\n\t\tconst mapWidth = typeof mapData?.width === \"number\" ? mapData.width : 0;\n\t\tconst mapHeight = typeof mapData?.height === \"number\" ? mapData.height : 0;\n\t\tconst hitboxes = Array.isArray(mapData?.hitboxes) ? mapData.hitboxes : [];\n\t\tif (mapWidth > 0 && mapHeight > 0) {\n\t\t\tconst gap = 100;\n\t\t\tthis.addStaticHitbox(\"map-width-left\", -gap, 0, gap, mapHeight);\n\t\t\tthis.addStaticHitbox(\"map-width-right\", mapWidth, 0, gap, mapHeight);\n\t\t\tthis.addStaticHitbox(\"map-height-top\", 0, -gap, mapWidth, gap);\n\t\t\tthis.addStaticHitbox(\"map-height-bottom\", 0, mapHeight, mapWidth, gap);\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor (let staticHitbox of hitboxes) if (\"x\" in staticHitbox) this.addStaticHitbox(staticHitbox.id ?? generateShortUUID(), staticHitbox.x, staticHitbox.y, staticHitbox.width, staticHitbox.height);\n\t\telse if (\"points\" in staticHitbox) this.addStaticHitbox(staticHitbox.id ?? generateShortUUID(), staticHitbox.points);\n\t\tthis.emitPhysicsInit({ mapData });\n\t\tthis.playersSubscription = this.players.observable.subscribe(({ value: player, type, key }) => {\n\t\t\tif (type === \"remove\") {\n\t\t\t\tthis.removeHitbox(key, player, \"hero\");\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (type == \"reset\") {\n\t\t\t\tif (!player) return;\n\t\t\t\tfor (let id in player) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst _player = player[id];\n\t\t\t\t\t_player.id = _player.id ?? id;\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(_player, \"hero\");\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (!player) return;\n\t\t\tif (type === \"add\") {\n\t\t\t\tplayer.id = key;\n\t\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(player, \"hero\");\n\t\t\t} else if (type === \"update\") {\n\t\t\t\tplayer.id = player.id ?? key;\n\t\t\t\tif (!this.getBody(key)) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(player, \"hero\");\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif (this.isPhysicsSyncingSignals) return;\n\t\t\t\tthis.updateCharacterHitbox(player);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t\tthis.eventsSubscription = this.events.observable.subscribe(({ value: event, type, key }) => {\n\t\t\tif (type === \"add\") {\n\t\t\t\tevent.id = key;\n\t\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(event, \"npc\", { mass: 100 });\n\t\t\t} else if (type === \"remove\") {\n\t\t\t\tconst eventObj = this.getObjectById(key);\n\t\t\t\tif (eventObj && typeof eventObj._movementUnsubscribe === \"function\") eventObj._movementUnsubscribe();\n\t\t\t\tthis.removeHitbox(key, event, \"npc\");\n\t\t\t} else if (type === \"update\") {\n\t\t\t\tevent.id = event.id ?? key;\n\t\t\t\tif (!this.getBody(key)) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(event, \"npc\", { mass: 100 });\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tthis.updateCharacterHitbox(event);\n\t\t\t} else if (type === \"reset\") for (const id in event) {\n\t\t\t\tconst _event = event[id];\n\t\t\t\tif (!_event) continue;\n\t\t\t\t_event.id = _event.id ?? id;\n\t\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(_event, \"npc\", { mass: 100 });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t\tconst players = this.players();\n\t\tfor (const id in players) {\n\t\t\tconst player = players[id];\n\t\t\tif (!player) continue;\n\t\t\tplayer.id = player.id ?? id;\n\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(player, \"hero\");\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst events = this.events();\n\t\tfor (const id in events) {\n\t\t\tconst event = events[id];\n\t\t\tif (!event) continue;\n\t\t\tevent.id = event.id ?? id;\n\t\t\tthis.createCharacterHitbox(event, \"npc\", { mass: 100 });\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.autoTickEnabled) this.tickSubscription = this.tick$.subscribe(({ delta }) => {\n\t\t\tthis.runFixedTicks(delta);\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tasync movePlayer(player, direction) {\n\t\tconst currentX = player.x();\n\t\tconst currentY = player.y();\n\t\tconst speed = player.speed();\n\t\tlet nextX = currentX;\n\t\tlet nextY = currentY;\n\t\tswitch (direction) {\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Left:\n\t\t\t\tnextX = currentX - speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Right:\n\t\t\t\tnextX = currentX + speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Up:\n\t\t\t\tnextY = currentY - speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Down:\n\t\t\t\tnextY = currentY + speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t}\n\t\tplayer.changeDirection(direction);\n\t\tif (typeof player.autoChangeMap === \"function\" && !player.isEvent()) {\n\t\t\tif (await player.autoChangeMap({\n\t\t\t\tx: nextX,\n\t\t\t\ty: nextY\n\t\t\t}, direction)) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.stopMovement(player);\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.moveBody(player, direction);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Check if an entity is currently moving\n\t* \n\t* @param id - ID of the entity to check\n\t* @returns Boolean indicating if the entity is in motion\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Check if player is moving\n\t* if (map.isMoving('player1')) {\n\t*   // Player is in motion\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tisMoving(id) {\n\t\treturn this.isEntityMoving(id);\n\t}\n\tgetObjectById(id) {\n\t\treturn this.players()[id] ?? this.events()[id];\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Execute physics simulation with fixed timestep\n\t* \n\t* This method runs the physics engine using a fixed timestep accumulator pattern.\n\t* It ensures deterministic physics regardless of frame rate by:\n\t* 1. Accumulating delta time\n\t* 2. Running fixed-size physics steps until the accumulator is depleted\n\t* 3. Calling `updateMovements()` before each step to apply velocity changes\n\t* 4. Running post-tick updates (zones, callbacks) after each step\n\t* \n\t* ## Architecture\n\t* \n\t* The physics loop is centralized here and called from `tick$` subscription.\n\t* Input processing (`processInput`) only updates entity velocities - it does NOT\n\t* step the physics. This ensures:\n\t* - Consistent physics timing (60fps fixed timestep)\n\t* - No double-stepping when inputs are processed\n\t* - Proper accumulator-based interpolation support\n\t* \n\t* @param deltaMs - Time elapsed since last call in milliseconds\n\t* @param hooks - Optional callbacks for before/after each physics step\n\t* @returns Number of physics ticks executed\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Called automatically by tick$ subscription\n\t* this.tickSubscription = this.tick$.subscribe(({ delta }) => {\n\t*   this.runFixedTicks(delta);\n\t* });\n\t* \n\t* // Or manually with hooks for debugging\n\t* this.runFixedTicks(16, {\n\t*   beforeStep: () => console.log('Before physics step'),\n\t*   afterStep: (tick) => console.log(`Physics tick ${tick} completed`)\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\trunFixedTicks(deltaMs, hooks) {\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(deltaMs) || deltaMs <= 0) return 0;\n\t\tconst fixedStepMs = this.physic.getWorld().getTimeStep() * 1e3;\n\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs += deltaMs;\n\t\tlet executed = 0;\n\t\twhile (this.physicsAccumulatorMs >= fixedStepMs) {\n\t\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs -= fixedStepMs;\n\t\t\thooks?.beforeStep?.();\n\t\t\tthis.physic.updateMovements();\n\t\t\tconst tick = this.physic.stepOneTick();\n\t\t\texecuted += 1;\n\t\t\tthis.runPostTickUpdates();\n\t\t\thooks?.afterStep?.(tick);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn executed;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Manually trigger a single game tick\n\t* \n\t* This method allows you to manually advance the game by one tick (16ms at 60fps).\n\t* It's primarily useful for testing where you need precise control over when\n\t* physics updates occur, rather than relying on the automatic tick$ subscription.\n\t* \n\t* ## Use Cases\n\t* \n\t* - **Testing**: Control exactly when physics steps occur in unit tests\n\t* - **Manual control**: Step through game state manually for debugging\n\t* - **Deterministic testing**: Ensure consistent timing in test scenarios\n\t* \n\t* ## Important\n\t* \n\t* This method should NOT be used in production code alongside the automatic `tick$`\n\t* subscription, as it will cause double-stepping. Use either:\n\t* - Automatic ticks (via `loadPhysic()` which subscribes to `tick$`)\n\t* - Manual ticks (via `nextTick()` without `loadPhysic()` subscription)\n\t* \n\t* @param deltaMs - Optional delta time in milliseconds (default: 16ms for 60fps)\n\t* @returns Number of physics ticks executed\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // In tests: manually advance game by one tick\n\t* map.nextTick(); // Advances by 16ms (one frame at 60fps)\n\t* \n\t* // With custom delta\n\t* map.nextTick(32); // Advances by 32ms (two frames at 60fps)\n\t* \n\t* // In a test loop\n\t* for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) {\n\t*   map.nextTick(); // Simulate 1 second of game time\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tnextTick(deltaMs = 16) {\n\t\treturn this.runFixedTicks(deltaMs);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Force a single physics tick outside of the normal game loop\n\t* \n\t* This method is primarily used for **client-side prediction** where the client\n\t* needs to immediately simulate physics in response to local input, rather than\n\t* waiting for the next game loop tick.\n\t* \n\t* ## Use Cases\n\t* \n\t* - **Client-side prediction**: Immediately simulate player movement for responsive feel\n\t* - **Testing**: Force a physics step in unit tests\n\t* - **Special effects**: Immediate physics response for specific game events\n\t* \n\t* ## Important\n\t* \n\t* This method should NOT be used on the server for normal input processing.\n\t* Server-side physics is handled by `runFixedTicks` in the main game loop to ensure\n\t* deterministic simulation.\n\t* \n\t* @param hooks - Optional callbacks for before/after the physics step\n\t* @returns The physics tick number\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Client-side: immediately simulate predicted movement\n\t* class RpgClientMap extends RpgCommonMap {\n\t*   stepPredictionTick(): void {\n\t*     this.forceSingleTick();\n\t*   }\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tforceSingleTick(hooks) {\n\t\thooks?.beforeStep?.();\n\t\tthis.physic.updateMovements();\n\t\tconst tick = this.physic.stepOneTick();\n\t\tthis.runPostTickUpdates();\n\t\thooks?.afterStep?.(tick);\n\t\tconst fixedMs = this.physic.getWorld().getTimeStep() * 1e3;\n\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs = Math.max(0, this.physicsAccumulatorMs - fixedMs);\n\t\treturn tick;\n\t}\n\tcreateCharacterHitbox(owner, kind, options) {\n\t\tif (!owner?.id) return;\n\t\tconst existingEntity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(owner.id);\n\t\tif (existingEntity) {\n\t\t\texistingEntity.owner = owner;\n\t\t\tthis.bindCharacterSignalSync(existingEntity, owner);\n\t\t\tthis.updateCharacterHitbox(owner);\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst hitbox = typeof owner.hitbox === \"function\" ? owner.hitbox() : owner.hitbox;\n\t\tconst width = hitbox?.w ?? 32;\n\t\tconst height = hitbox?.h ?? 32;\n\t\tconst radius = Math.max(width, height) / 2;\n\t\tthis.addCharacter({\n\t\t\towner,\n\t\t\tradius,\n\t\t\tkind,\n\t\t\tmaxSpeed: owner.speed(),\n\t\t\tcollidesWithCharacters: !this.shouldDisableCharacterCollisions(owner),\n\t\t\tisStatic: options?.isStatic,\n\t\t\tmass: options?.mass\n\t\t});\n\t\tconst entity = this.getBody(owner.id);\n\t\tif (entity) this.emitPhysicsEntityAdd({\n\t\t\towner,\n\t\t\tentity,\n\t\t\tkind\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tupdateCharacterHitbox(owner) {\n\t\tif (!owner?.id) return;\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(owner.id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return;\n\t\tentity.owner = owner;\n\t\tthis.bindCharacterSignalSync(entity, owner);\n\t\tconst hitbox = typeof owner.hitbox === \"function\" ? owner.hitbox() : owner.hitbox;\n\t\tconst width = hitbox?.w ?? 32;\n\t\tconst height = hitbox?.h ?? 32;\n\t\tconst topLeftX = this.resolveNumeric(owner.x);\n\t\tconst topLeftY = this.resolveNumeric(owner.y);\n\t\tthis.updateHitbox(owner.id, topLeftX, topLeftY, width, height);\n\t\tthis.setCharacterCollisionEnabled(owner.id, !this.shouldDisableCharacterCollisions(owner));\n\t}\n\tresolveNumeric(source, fallback = 0) {\n\t\tif (typeof source === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\treturn Number(source()) ?? fallback;\n\t\t} catch {\n\t\t\treturn fallback;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (typeof source === \"number\") return source;\n\t\treturn fallback;\n\t}\n\tbindCharacterSignalSync(entity, owner) {\n\t\tconst entityAny = entity;\n\t\tif (entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner === owner && typeof entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe === \"function\") return;\n\t\tthis.unbindCharacterSignalSync(entity);\n\t\tentityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner = owner;\n\t\tconst subscriptions = [];\n\t\tentityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe = () => {\n\t\t\tsubscriptions.forEach((subscription) => subscription.unsubscribe());\n\t\t\tdelete entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe;\n\t\t\tdelete entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner;\n\t\t};\n\t\tconst syncFromSignals = () => {\n\t\t\tif (this.isPhysicsSyncingSignals) return;\n\t\t\tconst currentOwner = entityAny.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!currentOwner?.id || currentOwner.id !== entity.uuid) return;\n\t\t\tthis.updateCharacterHitbox(currentOwner);\n\t\t};\n\t\tconst subscribeSignal = (signalLike) => {\n\t\t\tconst observable = signalLike?.observable;\n\t\t\tif (!observable || typeof observable.subscribe !== \"function\") return;\n\t\t\tsubscriptions.push(observable.subscribe(() => syncFromSignals()));\n\t\t};\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner.x);\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner.y);\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner.hitbox);\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner._through);\n\t}\n\tunbindCharacterSignalSync(entity) {\n\t\tconst entityAny = entity;\n\t\tconst unsubscribe = entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe;\n\t\tif (typeof unsubscribe === \"function\") {\n\t\t\tunsubscribe();\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tdelete entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner;\n\t}\n\tshouldDisableCharacterCollisions(owner) {\n\t\tif (typeof owner._through === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\treturn !!owner._through();\n\t\t} catch {\n\t\t\treturn false;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (typeof owner.through === \"boolean\") return owner.through;\n\t\treturn false;\n\t}\n\tresolvePhysicsEntityKind(owner, id) {\n\t\tif (typeof owner?.isEvent === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\tif (owner.isEvent()) return \"npc\";\n\t\t} catch {}\n\t\tconst ownerId = typeof owner?.id === \"string\" ? owner.id : id;\n\t\tif (ownerId && this.players()?.[ownerId]) return \"hero\";\n\t\tif (ownerId && this.events()?.[ownerId]) return \"npc\";\n\t\treturn \"generic\";\n\t}\n\temitPhysicsInit(_context) {}\n\temitPhysicsEntityAdd(_context) {}\n\temitPhysicsEntityRemove(_context) {}\n\temitPhysicsReset() {}\n\twithPhysicsSync(run) {\n\t\tthis.physicsSyncDepth += 1;\n\t\ttry {\n\t\t\treturn run();\n\t\t} finally {\n\t\t\tthis.physicsSyncDepth -= 1;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tget isPhysicsSyncingSignals() {\n\t\treturn this.physicsSyncDepth > 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get the world maps manager\n\t* \n\t* @returns WorldMapsManager instance or null if not configured\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const worldMaps = map.getWorldMapsManager();\n\t* if (worldMaps) {\n\t*   const adjacentMaps = worldMaps.getAdjacentMaps(currentMap, coordinates);\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetWorldMapsManager() {\n\t\treturn this.worldMapsManager ?? null;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get attached World\n\t* \n\t* Recover the world attached to this map (undefined if no world attached)\n\t* \n\t* @since 3.0.0-beta.8\n\t* @returns {RpgWorldMaps | undefined} The world maps manager instance if attached, otherwise undefined\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const world = map.getInWorldMaps();\n\t* if (world) {\n\t*   console.log(world.getAllMaps());\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetInWorldMaps() {\n\t\treturn this.worldMapsManager ?? void 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Remove this map from the world\n\t* \n\t* Remove this map from the world\n\t* \n\t* @since 3.0.0-beta.8\n\t* @returns {boolean | undefined} True if removed, false if not found, undefined if no world attached\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const removed = map.removeFromWorldMaps();\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tremoveFromWorldMaps() {\n\t\tif (!this.worldMapsManager) return void 0;\n\t\tconst id = this.id;\n\t\tif (!id) return false;\n\t\treturn this.worldMapsManager.removeMap(id);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Assign the map to a world\n\t* \n\t* Assign the map to a world\n\t* \n\t* @since 3.0.0-beta.8\n\t* @param {RpgWorldMaps} worldMap world maps\n\t* @returns {void}\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const world = new WorldMapsManager();\n\t* world.configure([{ id: 'm1', worldX: 0, worldY: 0, width: 1024, height: 1024 }]);\n\t* map.setInWorldMaps(world);\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tsetInWorldMaps(worldMap) {\n\t\tthis.worldMapsManager = worldMap;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Create a temporary and moving hitbox on the map\n\t* \n\t* Allows to create a temporary hitbox that moves through multiple positions sequentially.\n\t* For example, you can use it to explode a bomb and find all the affected players, \n\t* or during a sword strike, you can create a moving hitbox and find the affected players.\n\t* \n\t* The method creates a zone sensor that moves through the specified hitbox positions\n\t* at the given speed, detecting collisions with players and events at each step.\n\t* \n\t* @param hitboxes - Array of hitbox positions to move through sequentially\n\t* @param options - Configuration options for the movement\n\t* @returns Observable that emits arrays of hit entities and completes when movement is finished\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Create a sword slash effect that moves through two positions\n\t* map.createMovingHitbox([\n\t*   { x: 100, y: 100, width: 50, height: 50 },\n\t*   { x: 120, y: 100, width: 50, height: 50 }\n\t* ], { speed: 2 }).subscribe({\n\t*   next(hits) {\n\t*     // hits contains RpgPlayer or RpgEvent objects that were hit\n\t*     console.log('Hit entities:', hits);\n\t*   },\n\t*   complete() {\n\t*     console.log('Movement finished');\n\t*   }\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tcreateMovingHitbox(hitboxes, options = {}) {\n\t\tconst { speed = 1 } = options;\n\t\tconst zoneId = `moving_hitbox_${generateShortUUID()}`;\n\t\treturn new Observable((observer) => {\n\t\t\tif (hitboxes.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tobserver.complete();\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlet currentIndex = 0;\n\t\t\tlet frameCounter = 0;\n\t\t\tconst hitEntities = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\t\tconst firstHitbox = hitboxes[0];\n\t\t\tconst radius = Math.max(firstHitbox.width, firstHitbox.height) / 2;\n\t\t\tthis.addZone(zoneId, {\n\t\t\t\tx: firstHitbox.x + firstHitbox.width / 2,\n\t\t\t\ty: firstHitbox.y + firstHitbox.height / 2,\n\t\t\t\tradius\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tthis.registerZoneEvents(zoneId, (hitIds) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst hitObjects = hitIds.map((id) => this.getObjectById(id)).filter((obj) => obj !== void 0);\n\t\t\t\tif (hitObjects.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\thitIds.forEach((id) => hitEntities.add(id));\n\t\t\t\t\tobserver.next(hitObjects);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tconst tickSubscription = this.tick$.subscribe(() => {\n\t\t\t\tframeCounter++;\n\t\t\t\tif (frameCounter >= speed) {\n\t\t\t\t\tframeCounter = 0;\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrentIndex++;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (currentIndex >= hitboxes.length) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.removeZone(zoneId);\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttickSubscription.unsubscribe();\n\t\t\t\t\t\tobserver.complete();\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tconst nextHitbox = hitboxes[currentIndex];\n\t\t\t\t\tif (this.getZone(zoneId)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.removeZone(zoneId);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst newRadius = Math.max(nextHitbox.width, nextHitbox.height) / 2;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.addZone(zoneId, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tx: nextHitbox.x + nextHitbox.width / 2,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ty: nextHitbox.y + nextHitbox.height / 2,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tradius: newRadius\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.registerZoneEvents(zoneId, (hitIds) => {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst hitObjects = hitIds.map((id) => this.getObjectById(id)).filter((obj) => obj !== void 0);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (hitObjects.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\thitIds.forEach((id) => hitEntities.add(id));\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tobserver.next(hitObjects);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn () => {\n\t\t\t\ttickSubscription.unsubscribe();\n\t\t\t\tthis.removeZone(zoneId);\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Add a static hitbox to the physics world\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\taddStaticHitbox(id, xOrPoints, y, width, height) {\n\t\tif (this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id)) throw new Error(`Hitbox with id ${id} already exists`);\n\t\tlet entity;\n\t\tlet boxWidth;\n\t\tlet boxHeight;\n\t\tif (Array.isArray(xOrPoints)) {\n\t\t\tconst points = xOrPoints;\n\t\t\tif (points.length < 3) throw new Error(`Polygon must have at least 3 points, got ${points.length}`);\n\t\t\tlet minX = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tlet minY = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tlet maxX = Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tlet maxY = Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tfor (const point of points) {\n\t\t\t\tif (!Array.isArray(point) || point.length !== 2 || typeof point[0] !== \"number\" || typeof point[1] !== \"number\") throw new Error(`Invalid point ${JSON.stringify(point)}. Expected [x, y].`);\n\t\t\t\tminX = Math.min(minX, point[0]);\n\t\t\t\tmaxX = Math.max(maxX, point[0]);\n\t\t\t\tminY = Math.min(minY, point[1]);\n\t\t\t\tmaxY = Math.max(maxY, point[1]);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tconst centerX = (minX + maxX) / 2;\n\t\t\tconst centerY = (minY + maxY) / 2;\n\t\t\tboxWidth = Math.max(maxX - minX, 1);\n\t\t\tboxHeight = Math.max(maxY - minY, 1);\n\t\t\tentity = this.physic.createEntity({\n\t\t\t\tuuid: id,\n\t\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: centerX,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: centerY\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\twidth: boxWidth,\n\t\t\t\theight: boxHeight,\n\t\t\t\tmass: Infinity,\n\t\t\t\tstate: EntityState.Static,\n\t\t\t\trestitution: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tentity.freeze();\n\t\t\tconst localVertices = points.map((point) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst [px, py] = point;\n\t\t\t\treturn new Vector2(px - centerX, py - centerY);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tassignPolygonCollider(entity, { vertices: localVertices });\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif (typeof y !== \"number\" || typeof width !== \"number\" || typeof height !== \"number\") throw new Error(\"Rectangle hitbox requires x, y, width and height parameters\");\n\t\t\tconst centerX = xOrPoints + width / 2;\n\t\t\tconst centerY = y + height / 2;\n\t\t\tboxWidth = Math.max(width, 1);\n\t\t\tboxHeight = Math.max(height, 1);\n\t\t\tentity = this.physic.createEntity({\n\t\t\t\tuuid: id,\n\t\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: centerX,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: centerY\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\twidth: boxWidth,\n\t\t\t\theight: boxHeight,\n\t\t\t\tmass: Infinity,\n\t\t\t\tstate: EntityState.Static,\n\t\t\t\trestitution: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tentity.freeze();\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn id;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Add a character to the physics world\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\t/**\n\t* Add a character entity to the physics world\n\t* \n\t* Creates a physics entity for a character (player or NPC) with proper position handling.\n\t* The owner's x/y signals represent **top-left** coordinates, while the physics entity\n\t* uses **center** coordinates internally.\n\t* \n\t* ## Position System\n\t* \n\t* - `owner.x()` / `owner.y()` → **top-left** corner of the character's hitbox\n\t* - `entity.position` → **center** of the physics collider\n\t* - Conversion: `center = topLeft + (size / 2)`\n\t* \n\t* @param options - Character configuration\n\t* @returns The character's unique ID\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Player at top-left position (100, 100) with 32x32 hitbox\n\t* // Physics entity will be at center (116, 116)\n\t* this.addCharacter({\n\t*   owner: player,\n\t*   x: 116,  // center X (ignored, uses owner.x())\n\t*   y: 116,  // center Y (ignored, uses owner.y())\n\t*   kind: \"hero\"\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t* \n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\taddCharacter(options) {\n\t\tif (!options || typeof options.owner?.id !== \"string\") throw new Error(\"Character requires an owner object with a string id\");\n\t\tconst owner = options.owner;\n\t\tconst id = owner.id;\n\t\tconst hitbox = typeof owner.hitbox === \"function\" ? owner.hitbox() : owner.hitbox;\n\t\tconst width = hitbox?.w ?? 32;\n\t\tconst height = hitbox?.h ?? 32;\n\t\tconst radius = Math.max(width, height) / 2;\n\t\tconst topLeftX = owner.x();\n\t\tconst topLeftY = owner.y();\n\t\tconst centerX = topLeftX + width / 2;\n\t\tconst centerY = topLeftY + height / 2;\n\t\tconst isStatic = !!options.isStatic;\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.createEntity({\n\t\t\tuuid: id,\n\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\tx: centerX,\n\t\t\t\ty: centerY\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tradius: Math.max(radius, 1),\n\t\t\twidth,\n\t\t\theight,\n\t\t\tmass: options.mass ?? (isStatic ? Infinity : 1),\n\t\t\tfriction: options.friction ?? .4,\n\t\t\tlinearDamping: isStatic ? 1 : .2,\n\t\t\tmaxLinearVelocity: options.maxSpeed ? options.maxSpeed * this.speedScalar : 200,\n\t\t\trestitution: 0\n\t\t});\n\t\tif (isStatic) entity.freeze();\n\t\telse entity.unfreeze();\n\t\tentity.owner = owner;\n\t\tthis.bindCharacterSignalSync(entity, owner);\n\t\tentity.onDirectionChange(({ cardinalDirection }) => {\n\t\t\tif (!(\"$send\" in this)) return;\n\t\t\tconst owner = entity.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!owner) return;\n\t\t\tif (cardinalDirection === \"idle\") return;\n\t\t\tif (owner.directionFixed) return;\n\t\t\towner.changeDirection(cardinalDirection);\n\t\t});\n\t\tentity.onMovementChange(({ isMoving, intensity }) => {\n\t\t\tif (!(\"$send\" in this)) return;\n\t\t\tconst owner = entity.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!owner) return;\n\t\t\tif (owner.animationFixed) return;\n\t\t\tconst LOW_INTENSITY_THRESHOLD = 10;\n\t\t\tconst hasSetAnimation = typeof owner.setAnimation === \"function\";\n\t\t\tconst animationNameSignal = owner.animationName;\n\t\t\tconst ownerHasAnimationName = animationNameSignal && typeof animationNameSignal === \"object\" && typeof animationNameSignal.set === \"function\";\n\t\t\tif (isMoving && intensity > LOW_INTENSITY_THRESHOLD) {\n\t\t\t\tif (hasSetAnimation) owner.setGraphicAnimation(\"walk\");\n\t\t\t\telse if (ownerHasAnimationName) animationNameSignal.set(\"walk\");\n\t\t\t} else if (!isMoving) {\n\t\t\t\tif (hasSetAnimation) owner.setGraphicAnimation(\"stand\");\n\t\t\t\telse if (ownerHasAnimationName) animationNameSignal.set(\"stand\");\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t\tentity.onPositionChange(({ x, y }) => {\n\t\t\tconst currentOwner = entity.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!currentOwner) return;\n\t\t\tconst entityWidth = entity.width || width;\n\t\t\tconst entityHeight = entity.height || height;\n\t\t\tconst topLeftX = x - entityWidth / 2;\n\t\t\tconst topLeftY = y - entityHeight / 2;\n\t\t\tlet changed = false;\n\t\t\tthis.withPhysicsSync(() => {\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof currentOwner.x === \"function\" && typeof currentOwner.x.set === \"function\") {\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrentOwner.x.set(Math.round(topLeftX));\n\t\t\t\t\tchanged = true;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof currentOwner.y === \"function\" && typeof currentOwner.y.set === \"function\") {\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrentOwner.y.set(Math.round(topLeftY));\n\t\t\t\t\tchanged = true;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tif (changed) currentOwner.applyFrames?.();\n\t\t});\n\t\tentity.addResolutionFilter((self, other) => {\n\t\t\tconst selfOwner = self.owner;\n\t\t\tconst otherOwner = other.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!selfOwner || !otherOwner) return true;\n\t\t\tif (selfOwner.z() !== otherOwner.z()) return false;\n\t\t\tif (typeof selfOwner._through === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\t\tif (selfOwner._through() === true) return false;\n\t\t\t} catch {}\n\t\t\telse if (selfOwner.through === true) return false;\n\t\t\tconst playersMap = this.players();\n\t\t\tconst eventsMap = this.events();\n\t\t\tconst isSelfPlayer = !!playersMap[self.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst isOtherPlayer = !!playersMap[other.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst isSelfEvent = !!eventsMap[self.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst isOtherEvent = !!eventsMap[other.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst readScenarioOwnerId = (owner) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst scenarioOwnerId = owner?._scenarioOwnerId ?? owner?.scenarioOwnerId;\n\t\t\t\treturn typeof scenarioOwnerId === \"string\" && scenarioOwnerId.length > 0 ? scenarioOwnerId : void 0;\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst selfScenarioOwnerId = readScenarioOwnerId(selfOwner);\n\t\t\tconst otherScenarioOwnerId = readScenarioOwnerId(otherOwner);\n\t\t\tif (selfScenarioOwnerId) {\n\t\t\t\tif (isOtherPlayer && other.uuid !== selfScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t\tif (isOtherEvent && otherScenarioOwnerId !== selfScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (otherScenarioOwnerId) {\n\t\t\t\tif (isSelfPlayer && self.uuid !== otherScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t\tif (isSelfEvent && selfScenarioOwnerId !== otherScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (isSelfPlayer && isOtherPlayer) {\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof selfOwner._throughOtherPlayer === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (selfOwner._throughOtherPlayer() === true) return false;\n\t\t\t\t} catch {}\n\t\t\t\telse if (selfOwner.throughOtherPlayer === true) return false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (isSelfPlayer && isOtherEvent) {\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof selfOwner._throughEvent === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (selfOwner._throughEvent() === true) return false;\n\t\t\t\t} catch {}\n\t\t\t\telse if (selfOwner.throughEvent === true) return false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn true;\n\t\t});\n\t\treturn id;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Update hitbox position and size\n\t* \n\t* @param id - Entity ID\n\t* @param x - Top-left X coordinate\n\t* @param y - Top-left Y coordinate\n\t* @param width - Optional width\n\t* @param height - Optional height\n\t* @returns True if hitbox was updated successfully\n\t*/\n\tupdateHitbox(id, x, y, width, height) {\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return false;\n\t\tif (typeof width === \"number\" && typeof height === \"number\") {\n\t\t\tentity.width = Math.max(width, 1);\n\t\t\tentity.height = Math.max(height, 1);\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst entityWidth = entity.width || entity.radius * 2 || 32;\n\t\tconst entityHeight = entity.height || entity.radius * 2 || 32;\n\t\tconst centerX = x + entityWidth / 2;\n\t\tconst centerY = y + entityHeight / 2;\n\t\tentity.position.set(centerX, centerY);\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Remove a hitbox from the physics world\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\tremoveHitbox(id, owner, kind) {\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return false;\n\t\tthis.unbindCharacterSignalSync(entity);\n\t\tconst resolvedOwner = owner ?? entity.owner;\n\t\tif (resolvedOwner) this.emitPhysicsEntityRemove({\n\t\t\towner: resolvedOwner,\n\t\t\tentity,\n\t\t\tkind: kind ?? this.resolvePhysicsEntityKind(resolvedOwner, id)\n\t\t});\n\t\tthis.physic.removeEntity(entity);\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Check if an entity is moving\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\tisEntityMoving(id) {\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return false;\n\t\treturn entity.velocity.length() > .1;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Move a body in a direction\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\tmoveBody(player, direction) {\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(player.id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return false;\n\t\tconst speedValue = player.speed();\n\t\tlet vx = 0, vy = 0;\n\t\tswitch (direction) {\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Left:\n\t\t\t\tvx = -speedValue * this.speedScalar;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Right:\n\t\t\t\tvx = speedValue * this.speedScalar;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Up:\n\t\t\t\tvy = -speedValue * this.speedScalar;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Down:\n\t\t\t\tvy = speedValue * this.speedScalar;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t}\n\t\tentity.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: vx,\n\t\t\ty: vy\n\t\t});\n\t\tentity.wakeUp();\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Stop movement for a player\n\t* \n\t* Completely stops all movement for a player, including:\n\t* - Clearing all active movement strategies (dash, linear moves, etc.)\n\t* - Setting velocity to zero\n\t* - Resetting intended direction\n\t* \n\t* This method is particularly useful when changing maps to ensure\n\t* the player doesn't carry over movement from the previous map.\n\t* \n\t* @param player - The player to stop\n\t* @returns True if the player was found and movement was stopped\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Stop player movement when changing maps\n\t* if (mapChanged) {\n\t*   map.stopMovement(player);\n\t* }\n\t* \n\t* // Stop movement when player dies\n\t* if (player.isDead()) {\n\t*   map.stopMovement(player);\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t* @protected\n\t*/\n\tstopMovement(player) {\n\t\tif (!this.physic.getEntityByUUID(player.id)) return false;\n\t\tthis.moveManager.stopMovement(player.id);\n\t\tplayer.pendingInputs = [];\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Set character collision enabled\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\tsetCharacterCollisionEnabled(id, collides) {\n\t\tif (!this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id)) return false;\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get collisions for an entity\n\t* \n\t* Returns all entities that are colliding with the specified entity.\n\t* Uses the entity's actual AABB bounds to detect collisions in all directions.\n\t* \n\t* @param id - Entity UUID to check collisions for\n\t* @returns Array of entity UUIDs that are colliding with the specified entity\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Get all entities colliding with player\n\t* const collisions = map.getCollisions('player1');\n\t* collisions.forEach(id => {\n\t*   console.log(`Entity ${id} is colliding with player`);\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetCollisions(id) {\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return [];\n\t\tconst collider = createCollider(entity);\n\t\tif (!collider) return [];\n\t\tconst entityAABB = collider.getBounds();\n\t\tconst expandedAABB = entityAABB.expand(1);\n\t\tconst nearby = this.physic.queryAABB(expandedAABB);\n\t\tconst collisions = [];\n\t\tfor (const other of nearby) {\n\t\t\tif (other.uuid === id) continue;\n\t\t\tconst otherCollider = createCollider(other);\n\t\t\tif (!otherCollider) continue;\n\t\t\tconst otherAABB = otherCollider.getBounds();\n\t\t\tif (entityAABB.intersects(otherAABB)) collisions.push(other.uuid);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn collisions;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get physics body (entity) for an id\n\t* @protected\n\t*/\n\tgetBody(id) {\n\t\treturn this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get the current physics tick\n\t* @returns Current tick number\n\t*/\n\tgetTick() {\n\t\treturn this.physic.getTick();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get body position in different modes\n\t* \n\t* @param id - Entity ID\n\t* @param mode - Position mode: \"center\" or \"top-left\"\n\t* @returns Position coordinates or undefined if entity not found\n\t*/\n\tgetBodyPosition(id, mode = \"center\") {\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return void 0;\n\t\tconst centerX = entity.position.x;\n\t\tconst centerY = entity.position.y;\n\t\tif (mode === \"center\") return {\n\t\t\tx: centerX,\n\t\t\ty: centerY\n\t\t};\n\t\tconst width = entity.width || (entity.radius ? entity.radius * 2 : 32);\n\t\tconst height = entity.height || (entity.radius ? entity.radius * 2 : 32);\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\tx: centerX - width / 2,\n\t\t\ty: centerY - height / 2\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Set body position\n\t* \n\t* @param id - Entity ID\n\t* @param x - X coordinate\n\t* @param y - Y coordinate\n\t* @param mode - Position mode: \"center\" or return;\n\t\tconst width = entity.width || (entity.radius ? entity.radius * 2 : 32);\n\t\tconst height = entity.height || (entity.radius ? entity.radius * 2 : 32);\n\t\tlet centerX = x;\n\t\tlet centerY = y;\n\t\tif (mode === \"top-left\") {\n\t\t\tcenterX = x + width / 2;\n\t\t\tcenterY = y + height / 2;\n\t\t}\n\t\tentity.position.set(centerX, centerY);\n\t\tentity.notifyPositionChange();\n\t\treturn entity;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Handle collision enter\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\t/**\n\t* Add a zone\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\taddZone(id, options) spatial relationships\n*/\nvar WorldMapsManager = class {\n\tconstructor() {\n\t\tthis.maps = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t\tthis.spatialIndex = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Configure {\n\t\tthis.maps.clear();\n\t\tthis.spatialIndex.clear();\n\t\tfor (const config of configs) {\n\t\t\tconst worldMap = {\n\t\t\t\tid: config.id,\n\t\t\t\tx: config.worldX,\n\t\t\t\ty: config.worldY,\n\t\t\t\twidth: config.width,\n\t\t\t\theight: config.height,\n\t\t\t\tworldX: config.worldX,\n\t\t\t\tworldY: config.worldY,\n\t\t\t\twidthPx: config.width,\n\t\t\t\theightPx: config.height,\n\t\t\t\ttileWidth: config.tileWidth ?? 32,\n\t\t\t\ttileHeight: config.tileHeight ?? 32\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tthis.maps.set(config.id, worldMap);\n\t\t\tthis.spatialIndex.set(`${config.worldX},${config.worldY}`, config.id);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Remove a map from the world by its id\n\t* \n\t* Deletes the map from the internal registry and spatial index.\n\t* \n\t* @param mapId - Map identifier\n\t* @returns True if a map was removed, false otherwise\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const removed = world.removeMap(\"forest\");\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tremoveMap(mapId) {\n\t\tconst map = this.maps.get(mapId);\n\t\tif (!map) return false;\n\t\tthis.maps.delete(mapId);\n\t\tthis.spatialIndex.delete(`${map.worldX},${map.worldY}`);\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Find adjacent maps based on various search strategies\n\t* \n\t* Supports three search modes:\n\t* - PositionBox: collect maps intersecting the given box\n\t* - Direction: collect maps adjacent in the given direction\n\t* - Point: collect the map containing the given world point\n\t* \n\t* The given `map` can be any object exposing `worldX`, `worldY`, `width`, `height` properties\n\t* (e.g. your `RpgMap` instance or a `WorldMapInfo`).\n\t* \n\t* @param map - The source map\n\t* @param search - Search strategy (box, direction or point)\n\t* @returns Array of matching adjacent map infos\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Point\n\t* world.getAdjacentMaps(currentMap, { x: 1024, y: 0 });\n\t* \n\t* // Direction\n\t* world.getAdjacentMaps(currentMap, Direction.Up);\n\t* \n\t* // Box\n\t* world.getAdjacentMaps(currentMap, { minX: 0, minY: 0, maxX: 2048, maxY: 1024 });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetAdjacentMaps(map, search) {\n\t\tconst maps = Array.from(this.maps.values());\n\t\tif (typeof search === \"number\") {\n\t\t\tconst src = map;\n\t\t\treturn maps.filter((m) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst horizontallyOverlapsOrTouches = Math.max(src.worldX, m.worldX) <= Math.min(src.worldX + src.widthPx, m.worldX + m.widthPx);\n\t\t\t\tconst verticallyOverlapsOrTouches = Math.max(src.worldY, m.worldY) <= Math.min(src.worldY + src.heightPx, m.worldY + m.heightPx);\n\t\t\t\tconst marginLeftRight = src.tileWidth / 2;\n\t\t\t\tconst marginTopDown = src.tileHeight / 2;\n\t\t\t\tswitch (search) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase 0: return verticallyOverlapsOrTouches && m.worldY + m.heightPx - marginTopDown === src.worldY;\n\t\t\t\t\tcase 1: return verticallyOverlapsOrTouches && m.worldY + marginTopDown === src.worldY + src.heightPx;\n\t\t\t\t\tcase 2: return horizontallyOverlapsOrTouches && m.worldX + m.widthPx - marginLeftRight === src.worldX;\n\t\t\t\t\tcase 3: return horizontallyOverlapsOrTouches && m.worldX + marginLeftRight === src.worldX + src.widthPx;\n\t\t\t\t\tdefault: return false;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (\"x\" in search && \"y\" in search) {\n\t\t\tconst found = maps.find((m) => search.x >= m.worldX && search.x < m.worldX + m.widthPx && search.y >= m.worldY && search.y < m.worldY + m.heightPx);\n\t\t\treturn found ? [found] : [];\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (\"minX\" in search) {\n\t\t\tconst { minX, minY, maxX, maxY } = search;\n\t\t\treturn maps.filter((m) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst aLeft = m.worldX;\n\t\t\t\tconst aRight = m.worldX + m.widthPx;\n\t\t\t\tconst aTop = m.worldY;\n\t\t\t\tconst aBottom = m.worldY + m.heightPx;\n\t\t\t\treturn aLeft < maxX && aRight > minX && aTop < maxY && aBottom > minY;\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn [];\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get map information by ID\n\t* \n\t* @param mapId - Map ID\n\t* @returns Map information or null if not found\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const mapInfo = worldMaps.getMapInfo(\"forest\");\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetMapInfo(mapId) {\n\t\treturn this.maps.get(mapId) ?? null;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get all configured maps\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of all world maps\n\t*/\n\tgetAllMaps() {\n\t\treturn Array.from(this.maps.values());\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Find map by world coordinates\n\t* \n\t* @param worldX - World X coordinate\n\t* @param worldY - World Y coordinate\n\t* @returns Map found or null\n\t*/\n\tgetMapByWorldCoordinates(worldX, worldY) {\n\t\tconst mapId = this.spatialIndex.get(`${worldX},${worldY}`);\n\t\treturn mapId ? this.maps.get(mapId) ?? null : null;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Calculate absolute world position of a player\n\t* \n\t* @param map - Current map\n\t* @param localX - Local X position in the map\n\t* @param localY - Local Y position in the map\n\t* @returns Absolute coordinates in the world\n\t*/\n\tgetWorldPosition(map, localX, localY) {\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\tx: map.worldX + localX,\n\t\t\ty: map.worldY + localY\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Calculate local position from world position\n\t* \n\t* @param worldX - World X position\n\t* @param worldY - World Y position\n\t* @param targetMap - Target map\n\t* @returns Local position in the target map\n\t*/\n\tgetLocalPosition(worldX, worldY, targetMap) {\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\tx: worldX - targetMap.worldX,\n\t\t\ty: worldY - targetMap.worldY\n\t\t};\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/modules.ts\nvar ModulesToken = \"ModulesToken\";\nfunction RpgModule(options) {\n\treturn (target) => {\n\t\tif (options.hooks) target.hooks = options.hooks;\n\t\tfor (let key in options) target.prototype[key] = options[key];\n\t};\n}\nvar Hooks = class {\n\tconstructor(modules, namespace) {\n\t\tthis.modules = modules;\n\t\tthis.namespace = namespace;\n\t\tthis.moduleHooks = {};\n\t\tthis.hookFunctions = {};\n\t\tthis.init();\n\t}\n\tinit() {\n\t\tfor (const module of this.modules) for (const type in module) {\n\t\t\tconst hookObject = module[type];\n\t\t\tfor (const hook in hookObject) {\n\t\t\t\tconst hookFunction = hookObject[hook];\n\t\t\t\tif (hookFunction) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst hookId = `${this.namespace}-${type}-${hook}`;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!this.moduleHooks[hookId]) this.moduleHooks[hookId] = new Subject();\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!this.hookFunctions[hookId]) this.hookFunctions[hookId] = [];\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!this.hookFunctions[hookId].includes(hookFunction)) this.hookFunctions[hookId].push(hookFunction);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn this.moduleHooks;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Call hooks for a specific ID, passing arguments to all subscribed hooks\n\t*\n\t* @param hookId - The unique identifier of the module hook\n\t* @param args - Arguments to pass to the hook functions\n\t* @returns An Observable that emits an array with all hook results when subscribed\n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Call all hook functions for the ID 'my-namespace-type-hook'\n\t* callHooks('my-namespace-type-hook', { x: 10, y: 20 }).subscribe(results => {\n\t*   console.log('Hook results:', results);  // Array of all hook function results\n\t* });\n\t* \n\t* // Hook functions are only executed when you subscribe to the returned Observable\n\t* const observable = callHooks('my-namespace-type-hook', player);\n\t* // ... later ...\n\t* observable.subscribe(results => {\n\t*   // Process results array\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tcallHooks(hookId, ...args) {\n\t\tif (!this.moduleHooks[hookId]) this.moduleHooks[hookId] = new Subject();\n\t\treturn new Observable((subscriber) => {\n\t\t\tif (this.hookFunctions[hookId] && this.hookFunctions[hookId].length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tconst subscription = from(this.hookFunctions[hookId]).pipe(mergeMap((hookFunction) => {\n\t\t\t\t\tlet result;\n\t\t\t\t\ttry {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tresult = hookFunction(...args);\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn from(Promise.resolve(result));\n\t\t\t\t\t} catch (error) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsubscriber.error(error);\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn [];\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}), toArray()).subscribe({\n\t\t\t\t\tnext: (results) => {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.moduleHooks[hookId].next(results);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsubscriber.next(results);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsubscriber.complete();\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\terror: (err) => {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsubscriber.error(err);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\treturn () => {\n\t\t\t\t\tsubscription.unsubscribe();\n\t\t\t\t};\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tsubscriber.next([]);\n\t\t\t\tsubscriber.complete();\n\t\t\t\treturn () => {};\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t}\n};\n/**\n* Provide modules configuration to Angular Dependency Injection\n* Registers hook functions for later execution\n*\n* @param modules - Array of modules to provide\n* @param namespace - Namespace to prefix hook IDs\n* @returns Provider configuration for Angular DI\n* @example\n* ```ts\n* // Define modules\n* const modules = [\n*   {\n*     player: {\n*       onMove: (player) => {\n*         // Handle player movement\n*       }\n*     }\n*   }\n* ];\n*\n* // Provide modules\n* const provider = provideModules(modules, 'game');\n* ```\n*/\nfunction provideModules(modules, namespace, transform) {\n\treturn {\n\t\tprovide: ModulesToken,\n\t\tuseFactory: (context) => {\n\t\t\tmodules = transform ? transform(modules, context) : modules;\n\t\t\treturn new Hooks(modules, namespace);\n\t\t}\n\t};\n}\nfunction findModules(context, namespace) {\n\tlet modules = [];\n\tfor (let key in context[\"values\"]) if (key.endsWith(\"Module\" + namespace)) modules.push(context[\"values\"][key].values.get(\"__default__\"));\n\treturn modules;\n}\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/Utils.ts\nfunction random(min, max) {\n\treturn Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1) + min);\n}\nfunction isFunction(val) {\n\treturn {}.toString.call(val) === \"[object Function]\";\n}\nfunction isArray(val) {\n\treturn isInstanceOf(val, Array);\n}\nfunction isString(val) {\n\treturn typeof val == \"string\";\n}\nfunction isInstanceOf(val, _class) {\n\treturn val instanceof _class;\n}\nfunction arrayUniq(array) {\n\treturn [...new Set(array)];\n}\nfunction arrayFlat(array) {\n\treturn array.reduce((acc, val) => acc.concat(val), []);\n}\nfunction capitalize(s) {\n\tif (typeof s !== \"string\") return \"\";\n\treturn s.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + s.slice(1);\n}\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/PrebuiltGui.ts\n/** \n* \n* Pre-made GUIs already exist. For example, the command `player.showText()` displays the rpg-dialog component. It is up to you to customize the component or take advantage of the `@rpgjs/default-gui` module which already contains ready-made components\n* \n* @title Prebuilt GUI\n* @enum {string}\n* \n* PrebuiltGui.Dialog | rpg-dialog\n* PrebuiltGui.MainMenu | rpg-main-menu\n* PrebuiltGui.Shop | rpg-shop\n* PrebuiltGui.Disconnect | rpg-disconnect\n* PrebuiltGui.Gameover | rpg-gameover\n* PrebuiltGui.Save | rpg-save\n* PrebuiltGui.Controls | rpg-controls\n* PrebuiltGui.Notification | rpg-notification\n* PrebuiltGui.TitleScreen | rpg-title-screen\n* @memberof PrebuiltGui\n* */\nvar PrebuiltGui = /* @__PURE__ */ function(PrebuiltGui) {\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"Dialog\"] = \"rpg-dialog\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"MainMenu\"] = \"rpg-main-menu\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"Shop\"] = \"rpg-shop\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"Disconnect\"] = \"rpg-disconnect\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"Gameover\"] = \"rpg-gameover\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"Save\"] = \"rpg-save\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"Controls\"] = \"rpg-controls\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"Notification\"] = \"rpg-notification\";\n\tPrebuiltGui[\"TitleScreen\"] = \"rpg-title-screen\";\n\treturn PrebuiltGui;\n}({});\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/PerlinNoise.ts\n/**\n* Perlin Noise 2D Generator\n* \n* A simple, efficient, and performant implementation of 2D Perlin noise.\n* Perlin noise generates smooth, natural-looking random values that are coherent\n* across space, making it ideal for procedural generation and smooth random movements.\n* \n* ## Features\n* - **Deterministic**: Same seed and coordinates always produce the same value\n* - **Smooth**: Values change gradually, creating natural-looking patterns\n* - **Performant**: Optimized for real-time use in movement systems\n* - **Seeded**: Optional seed for reproducible results\n* \n* ## Usage\n* ```ts\n* const noise = new PerlinNoise2D();\n* const value = noise.get(x, y); // Returns value between -1 and 1\n* \n* // With seed for deterministic results\n* const seededNoise = new PerlinNoise2D(12345);\n* ```\n* \n* @example\n* ```ts\n* // Use in movement system for smooth random directions\n* const noise = new PerlinNoise2D();\n* const time = Date.now() * 0.001;\n* const direction = Math.floor(noise.get(player.x(), player.y(), time) * 4) % 4;\n* ```\n*/\nvar PerlinNoise2D = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new Perlin noise generator\n\t* \n\t* @param seed - Optional seed for deterministic noise generation. If not provided, uses a default seed.\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const noise = new PerlinNoise2D(12345);\n\t* const value = noise.get(10, 20);\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(seed = 0) {\n\t\tthis.permutation = this.generatePermutation(seed);\n\t\tthis.p = [...this.permutation, ...this.permutation];\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Generates a permutation table based on seed\n\t* \n\t* @param seed - Seed value for permutation generation\n\t* @returns Array of 256 shuffled values\n\t*/\n\tgeneratePermutation(seed) {\n\t\tconst p = [];\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < 256; i++) p[i] = i;\n\t\tlet state = seed;\n\t\tconst lcg = () => {\n\t\t\tstate = state * 1103515245 + 12345 & 2147483647;\n\t\t\treturn state;\n\t\t};\n\t\tfor (let i = 255; i > 0; i--) {\n\t\t\tconst j = lcg() % (i + 1);\n\t\t\t[p[i], p[j]] = [p[j], p[i]];\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn p;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Fade function for smooth interpolation (ease curve)\n\t* \n\t* @param t - Value between 0 and 1\n\t* @returns Smoothed value between 0 and 1\n\t*/\n\tfade(t) {\n\t\treturn t * t * t * (t * (t * 6 - 15) + 10);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Linear interpolation\n\t* \n\t* @param a - Start value\n\t* @param b - End value\n\t* @param t - Interpolation factor (0 to 1)\n\t* @returns Interpolated value\n\t*/\n\tlerp(a, b, t) {\n\t\treturn a + t * (b - a);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gradient function - generates a pseudo-random gradient vector\n\t* \n\t* @param hash - Hash value from permutation table\n\t* @param x - X component\n\t* @param y - Y component\n\t* @returns Dot product of gradient and position\n\t*/\n\tgrad(hash, x, y) {\n\t\tswitch (hash & 3) {\n\t\t\tcase 0: return x + y;\n\t\t\tcase 1: return -x + y;\n\t\t\tcase 2: return x - y;\n\t\t\tcase 3: return -x - y;\n\t\t\tdefault: return 0;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the noise value at the specified 2D coordinates\n\t* \n\t* Returns a value between approximately -1 and 1, though values near the edges\n\t* are less common. For practical use, you may want to clamp or normalize the result.\n\t* \n\t* @param x - X coordinate\n\t* @param y - Y coordinate\n\t* @param scale - Optional scale factor (default: 0.1). Lower values create smoother, larger patterns.\n\t* @returns Noise value between approximately -1 and 1\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const noise = new PerlinNoise2D();\n\t* const value = noise.get(10, 20); // Basic usage\n\t* const scaled = noise.get(10, 20, 0.05); // Smoother pattern\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tget(x, y, scale = .1) {\n\t\tx *= scale;\n\t\ty *= scale;\n\t\tconst X = Math.floor(x) & 255;\n\t\tconst Y = Math.floor(y) & 255;\n\t\tx -= Math.floor(x);\n\t\ty -= Math.floor(y);\n\t\tconst u = this.fade(x);\n\t\tconst v = this.fade(y);\n\t\tconst A = this.p[X] + Y;\n\t\tconst AA = this.p[A];\n\t\tconst AB = this.p[A + 1];\n\t\tconst B = this.p[X + 1] + Y;\n\t\tconst BA = this.p[B];\n\t\tconst BB = this.p[B + 1];\n\t\treturn this.lerp(this.lerp(this.grad(this.p[AA], x, y), this.grad(this.p[BA], x - 1, y), u), this.lerp(this.grad(this.p[AB], x, y - 1), this.grad(this.p[BB], x - 1, y - 1), u), v);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets a normalized noise value between 0 and 1\n\t* \n\t* Convenience method that normalizes the noise output to a 0-1 range.\n\t* \n\t* @param x - X coordinate\n\t* @param y - Y coordinate\n\t* @param scale - Optional scale factor (default: 0.1)\n\t* @returns Noise value between 0 and 1\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const noise = new PerlinNoise2D();\n\t* const normalized = noise.getNormalized(10, 20);\n\t* // Returns value between 0 and 1\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetNormalized(x, y, scale = .1) {\n\t\treturn (this.get(x, y, scale) + 1) * .5;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets a noise value mapped to a specific range\n\t* \n\t* Maps the noise output to a custom min-max range.\n\t* \n\t* @param x - X coordinate\n\t* @param y - Y coordinate\n\t* @param min - Minimum output value\n\t* @param max - Maximum output value\n\t* @param scale - Optional scale factor (default: 0.1)\n\t* @returns Noise value between min and max\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const noise = new PerlinNoise2D();\n\t* const direction = noise.getRange(10, 20, 0, 3); // Returns 0, 1, 2, or 3\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetRange(x, y, min, max, scale = .1) {\n\t\treturn min + this.getNormalized(x, y, scale) * (max - min);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets an integer noise value in a specific range (inclusive)\n\t* \n\t* Useful for selecting discrete values like array indices or enum values.\n\t* \n\t* @param x - X coordinate\n\t* @param y - Y coordinate\n\t* @param min - Minimum integer value (inclusive)\n\t* @param max - Maximum integer value (inclusive)\n\t* @param scale - Optional scale factor (default: 0.1)\n\t* @returns Integer noise value between min and max (inclusive)\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const noise = new PerlinNoise2D();\n\t* const directionIndex = noise.getInt(10, 20, 0, 3); // Returns 0, 1, 2, or 3\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetInt(x, y, min, max, scale = .1) {\n\t\tconst value = this.getRange(x, y, min, max + 1, scale);\n\t\treturn Math.floor(value);\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/Presets.ts\nvar MAXHP = \"maxHp\";\nvar MAXSP = \"maxSp\";\nvar ATK = \"atk\";\nvar PDEF = \"pdef\";\nvar SDEF = \"sdef\";\nvar STR = \"str\";\nvar AGI = \"agi\";\nvar INT = \"int\";\nvar DEX = \"dex\";\n//#endregion\n//#region ../../node_modules/.pnpm/@signe+di@2.9.0/node_modules/@signe/di/dist/index.js\nvar __defProp = Object.defineProperty;\nvar __name = (target, value) => __defProp(target, \"name\", {\n\tvalue,\n\tconfigurable: true\n});\nvar DEFAULT_INSTANCE_KEY = \"__default__\";\nfunction toTokenName(token) {\n\treturn typeof token === \"function\" ? token.name : token;\n}\n__name(toTokenName, \"toTokenName\");\nfunction toInstanceKey(name) {\n\treturn name ?? RPG_TYPE. Il supporte deux types :\n * - 'rpg' : pour le mode standalone\n * - 'mmorpg' : pour le mode multijoueur\n * \n * Le plugin recherche dans le HTML les balises script existantes et les remplace\n * par le bon point d'entrée selon le type configuré.\n * \n * @param options - Configuration du plugin\n * @returns Plugin Vite\n * \n * @example\n * ```typescript\n * // vite.config.ts\n * import { entryPointPlugin } from '@rpgjs/vite';\n * \n * export default defineConfig({\n *   plugins: [\n *     entryPointPlugin({\n *       entryPoints: {\n *         rpg: './src/standalone.ts',\n *         mmorpg: './src/client.ts'\n *       }\n *     })\n *   ]\n * });\n * ```\n */\nexport function entryPointPlugin(options: EntryPointPluginOptions = {}): Plugin {\n  const {\n    entryPoints = {\n      rpg: './src/standalone.ts',\n      mmorpg: './src/client.ts'\n    },\n    rpgType = process.env.RPG_TYPE || 'rpg'\n  } = options;\n\n  return {\n    name: 'rpgjs:entry-point',\n    transformIndexHtml: {\n      order: 'pre',\n      handler(html: string) {\n        // Determine the correct entry point based on RPG type\n        const currentEntryPoint = entryPoints[rpgType as keyof typeof entryPoints];\n        \n        if (!currentEntryPoint) {\n          console.warn(`[rpgjs:entry-point] Unknown RPG_TYPE: ${rpgType}.
